openBrace;\n\t\t\t\t\toutput[2] = start + paramStart;\n\t\t\t\t\toutput[3] = start + paramEnd;\n\t\t\t\t\toutput[4] = start + closeBrace + 1;\n\t\t\t\t\toutput[5] = end;\n\t\t\t\t\treturn output;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if (firstChar === 36) {\n\t\t\tconst dollarPos = openBrace + 1;\n\t\t\tconst afterDollar = openBrace + 2;\n\t\t\tif (afterDollar === closeBrace) 1;\n\t\t\t\toutput[5] = path.length;\n\t\t\t\treturn output;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\toutput[0] = 1;\n\t\t\toutput[1] = start + openBrace;\n\t\t\toutput[2] = start + afterDollar;\n\t\t\toutput[3] = start + closeBrace;\n\t\t\toutput[4] = start + closeBrace + 1;\n\t\t\toutput[5] = end;\n\t\t\treturn output;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\toutput[0] = 0;\n\toutput[1] = start;\n\toutput[2] = start;\n\toutput[3] = end;\n\toutput[4] = end;\n\toutput[5] = end;\n\treturn output;\n}\n/**\n* Recursively parses the segments of the given route tree and populates a segment trie.\n*\n* @param data A reusable Uint16Array {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tnode.staticInsensitive ??= /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconst next = createStaticNode(route.fullPath ?? route.from);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tnext.parent = child, cursor, node, depth, onRoute);\n}\nfunction sortDynamic(a, b) {\n\tif (a.parse && !b.parse) return -1;\n\tif (!a.parse && b.parse) return 1;\n\tif (a.parse && b.parse && (a.priority || b.priority)) return b.priority - a.priority;\n\tif (a.prefix && b.prefix && a.prefix !== b.prefix) {\n\t\tif (a.prefix.startsWith(b.prefix)) return -1;\n\t\tif (b.prefix.startsWith(a.prefix)) return (!a.caseSensitive && b.caseSensitive) return 1;\n\treturn 0;\n}\nfunction sortTreeNodes(node) {\n\tif (node.pathless) for (const child of node.pathless) sortTreeNodes(child);\n\tif (node.static) for createStaticNode(fullPath) {\n\treturn {\n\t\tkind: 0,\n\t\tdepth: 0,\n\t\tpathless: null,\n\t\tindex: null,\n\t\tstatic: null,\n\t\tstaticInsensitive: null,\n\t\tdynamic: null,\n\t\toptional: to ensure they are represented as the same object class in the engine.\n*/\nfunction createDynamicNode(kind, fullPath, caseSensitive, prefix, suffix) {\n\treturn {\n\t\tkind,\n\t\tdepth: 0);\n\tsortTreeNodes(segmentTree);\n\tprocessedTree.masksTree = segmentTree;\n\tprocessedTree.flatCache = createLRUCache(1e3);\n}\n/**\n* Take an arbitrary list of routes, create a tree from them (if return cached;\n\tconst result = findMatch(path, processedTree.masksTree);\n\tprocessedTree.flatCache.set(path, result);\n\treturn result;\n}\n/**\n* @deprecated keep until v2 so that `router.matchRoute` can keep not caring about the actual route tree\n*/\nfunction findSingleMatch(from, caseSensitive, fuzzy, path, processedTree) {\n\tfrom ||= \"/\";\n\tpath ||= \"/\";\n\tconst key fuzzy ? path : `nofuzz\\0${path}`;\n\tconst cached = processedTree.matchCache.get(key);\n\tif (cached !== void 0) return cached;\n\tpath ||= \"/\";\n\tlet result;\n\ttry {\n\t\tresult = \"resumable\":\n* - the `leaf` input can contain `extract` and `rawParams` properties from a previous `extractParams` call\n* - the returned `state` can be passed back as `extract` in a future call to continue extracting params from where we left off\n*\n* Inputs are *not* mutated.\n*/\nfunction extractParams(path, parts, leaf) {\n\tconst list = buildBranch(leaf.node);\n\tlet nodeParts = ?? 0;\n\t/** which fullPath segment we're currently processing */\n\tlet segmentCount = leaf.extract?.segment ?? 0;\n\tfor (; nodeIndex < list.length; partIndex++, nodeIndex++, pathIndex++, 1);\n\t\t\t\tconst value = part.substring(preLength, part.length - sufLength);\n\t\t\t\trawParams[name] = decodeURIComponent(value);\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tconst name = nodePart.substring(1);\n\t\t\t\trawParams[name] = decodeURIComponent(part);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if (node.kind === 3) {\n\t\t\tif (leaf.skipped & 1 << nodeIndex) sufLength - 1);\n\t\t\tconst value = node.suffix || node.prefix ? part.substring(preLength, part.length - sufLength) : part;\n\t\t\tif (value) rawParams[name] = decodeURIComponent(value);\n\t\t} else decodeURIComponent(value);\n\t\t\trawParams[\"*\"] = splat;\n\t\t\trawParams._splat = splat;\n\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif (leaf.rawParams) Object.assign(rawParams, leaf.rawParams);\n\treturn [rawParams, {\n\t\tpart: partIndex,\n\t\tnode: nodeIndex,\n\t\tpath: pathIndex,\n\t\tsegment: segmentCount\n\t}];\n}\nfunction buildRouteBranch(route) {\n\tconst list = [route];\n\twhile (route.parentRoute) {\n\t\troute = route.parentRoute;\n\t\tlist.push(route);\n\t}\n\tlist.reverse();\n\treturn list;\n}\nfunction buildBranch(node) {\n\tconst list = Array(node.depth + 1);\n\tdo {\n\t\tlist[node.depth] = node;\n\t\tnode = node.parent;\n\t} while (node);\n\treturn list;\n}\nfunction getNodeMatch(path, parts, segmentTree, fuzzy) {\n\tif (path === \"/\" && segmentTree.index) null;\n\tlet bestMatch = null;\n\twhile (stack.length) {\n\t\tconst frame = stack.pop();\n\t\tconst { node, index, skipped, depth, statics, dynamics, optionals } = frame;\n\t\tlet { extract, rawParams } = frame;\n\t\tif (node.kind === 2 && node.route && !isFrameMoreSpecific(bestMatch, frame)) continue;\n\t\tif (node.parse) {\n\t\t\tif (!validateParseParams(path, parts, frame)) continue;\n\t\t\trawParams = frame.rawParams;\n\t\t\textract = frame.extract;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (fuzzy && node.route && node.kind !== SEGMENT_TYPE_INDEX && isFrameMoreSpecific(bestFuzzy, frame)) isFrameMoreSpecific(bestMatch, frame)) bestMatch = frame;\n\t\t\tif (!node.optional && !node.wildcard && !node.index && !node.pathless) continue;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst part = isBeyondPath ? void 0 : parts[index];\n\t\tlet lowerPart;\n\t\tif (isBeyondPath && node.index) {\n\t\t\tconst indexFrame = {\n\t\t\t\tnode: node.index,\n\t\t\t\tindex,\n\t\t\t\tskipped,\n\t\t\t\tdepth: depth + 1,\n\t\t\t\tstatics,\n\t\t\t\tdynamics,\n\t\t\t\toptionals,\n\t\t\t\textract,\n\t\t\t\trawParams\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tlet indexValid = true;\n\t\t\tif (node.index.parse) {\n\t\t\t\tif (!validateParseParams(path, parts, indexFrame)) indexValid = false;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (indexValid) {\n\t\t\t\tif (!dynamics && !optionals && !skipped && isPerfectStaticMatch(statics, partsLength)) return indexFrame;\n\t\t\t\tif (isFrameMoreSpecific(bestMatch, indexFrame)) bestMatch = indexFrame;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (node.wildcard) for (let i = node.wildcard.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n\t\t\tconst segment = node.wildcard[i];\n\t\t\tconst { prefix, suffix } = segment;\n\t\t\tif (prefix) {\n\t\t\t\tif (isBeyondPath) continue;\n\t\t\t\tif (!(segment.caseSensitive ? part : lowerPart ??= part.toLowerCase()).startsWith(prefix)) continue;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (suffix) {\n\t\t\t\tif (isBeyondPath) continue;\n\t\t\t\tconst end = TypeScript while still\n* maintaining the original functionality and interface.\n*\n* Update: this implementation has also been mangled to\n* fit exactly our use-case (single value per key in encoding).\n*/\n/**\n* Encodes an object into a query string.\n* @param obj - The object to encode into a query string.\n* @param stringify - An optional custom stringify function.\n* @returns The encoded query string.\n* @example\n* ```\n* // Example input: encode({ token: 'foo', key: 'value' })\n* // Expected output: \"token=foo&key=value\"\n* ```\n*/\nfunction encode(obj, stringify = String) {\n\tconst result = new URLSearchParams();\n\tfor (const key in obj) {\n\t\tconst val = obj[key];\n\t\tif (val !== void 0) result.set(key, stringify(val));\n\t}\n\treturn result.toString();\n}\n/**\n* toValue(\"123\")\n* // Expected output: 123\n*/\nfunction toValue(str) {\n\tif (!str) return \"\";\n\tif (str === \"false\") return false;\n\tif (str === \"true\") return true;\n\treturn +str * 0 === 0 && +str + \"\" === str ? +str : str;\n}\n/**\n* Decodes a query string into an object.\n* @param str - The query string to decode.\n* @returns The decoded key-value pairs in an object format.\n* @example\n* // Example input: decode(\"token=foo&key=value\")\n* // Expected output: { \"token\": \"foo\", \"key\": \"value\" }\n*/\nfunction decode(str) {\n\tconst searchParams = new This is a lightweight API wrapping the browser's native methods.\n* It is designed to work with TanStack Router, but could be used as a standalone API as well.\n* IMPORTANT: This API implements history throttling via a microtask to prevent\n* excessive calls to the history API. In some browsers, calling history.pushState or\n* history.replaceState in quick succession can cause the browser to ignore subsequent\n* calls. This API smooths out those differences and ensures that your application\n* state will *eventually* match the browser state. In most cases, this is not a problem,\n* but if you need to ensure that the browser state is up to date, you can use the\n* `history.flush` method to immediately flush all pending state changes to the browser URL.\n* @param opts\n* @param opts.getHref A function that returns the current href (path + search + hash)\n* @param opts.createHref A function that takes a path and returns a href (path + search + hash)\n* @returns A history instance\n*/\nfunction createBrowserHistory(opts) {\n\tconst win = opts?.window ?? string): readonly unknown[] => [\"dns\", \"templates\", \"detail\", id],\n};\n","/**\n * OrvixPanel API client.\n *\n * Wraps the native `fetch` API with:\n *   - automatic Authorization header injection (Bearer JWT)\n *   - automatic token refresh on 401, with a single in-flight refresh\n *     promise so concurrent requests don't fan out\n *   - a typed `ApiError` with the structured `{ error, request_id }`\n *     payload the Go backend returns\n *   - JSON request/response bodies\n *\n * The client is split into *modules* (auth.ts, accounts.ts, ...) that\n * re-use this base `request` function. Each module owns a slice of the\n * API surface and is the only thing the rest of the app imports.\n */\n\nimport { useAuthStore } from \"@/lib/auth/store\";\n\nexport class ApiError extends Error {\n  status: number;\n  code: string;\n  requestId: string | null;\n\n  constructor(status: number, code: string, requestId: string | null, message?: string) {\n    super(message ?? code);\n    this.name = \"ApiError\";\n    this.status = status;\n    this.code = code;\n    this.requestId = requestId;\n  }\n}\n\nlet inflightRefresh: Promise<boolean> | null = null;\n\nasync function tryRefresh(): Promise<boolean> {\n  if (inflightRefresh) return inflightRefresh;\n  inflightRefresh = (async () => {\n    const refreshToken = useAuthStore.getState().refreshToken;\n    if (!refreshToken) return false;\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/auth/refresh\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ refresh_token: refreshToken }),\n      });\n      if (!res.ok) return false;\n      const json = (await res.json()) as {\n        access_token: string;\n        refresh_token: string;\n        expires_at: string;\n      };\n      useAuthStore.getState().setTokens({\n        accessToken: json.access_token,\n        refreshToken: json.refresh_token,\n        expiresAt: json.expires_at,\n      });\n      return true;\n    } catch {\n      return false;\n    } finally {\n      inflightRefresh = null;\n    }\n  })();\n  return inflightRefresh;\n}\n\nexport interface RequestOptions {\n  method?: \"GET\" | \"POST\" | \"PUT\" | \"PATCH\" | \"DELETE\";\n  body?: unknown;\n  // Skip the access token (e.g. for the login call itself).\n  noAuth?: boolean;\n  // If true, return the raw Response (for streaming / non-JSON).\n  raw?: boolean;\n  // Override the default 15s timeout.\n  timeoutMs?: number;\n  // Per-request signal so callers can cancel via TanStack Query.\n  signal?: AbortSignal;\n}\n\nexport async function request<T>(path: string, opts: RequestOptions = {}): Promise<T> {\n  const { method = \"GET\", body, noAuth, raw, timeoutMs = 15000, signal } = opts;\n\n  const headers: Record<string, string> = {};\n  if (body !== undefined) headers[\"Content-Type\"] = \"application/json\";\n  if (!noAuth) {\n    const token = useAuthStore.getState().accessToken;\n    if (token) headers[\"Authorization\"] = `Bearer ${token}`;\n  }\n\n  // Compose external signal with a timeout signal.\n  const ctrl = new AbortController();\n  const onExternalAbort = () => ctrl.abort();\n  if (signal) signal.addEventListener(\"abort\", onExternalAbort);\n  const timer = setTimeout(() => ctrl.abort(), timeoutMs);\n\n  let res: Response;\n  try {\n    res = await fetch(path, {\n      method,\n      headers,\n      body: body !== undefined ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n      signal: ctrl.signal,\n      credentials: \"same-origin\",\n    });\n  } finally {\n    clearTimeout(timer);\n    if (signal) signal.removeEventListener(\"abort\", onExternalAbort);\n  }\n\n  // 401 — try a single refresh then retry the original request.\n  if (res.status === 401 && !noAuth) {\n    const ok = await tryRefresh();\n    if (ok) return request<T>(path, opts);\n    // Refresh failed — drop tokens, the route guard will redirect to /login.\n    useAuthStore.getState().clear();\n    throw new ApiError(401, \"unauthorized\", res.headers.get(\"X-Request-Id\"));\n  }\n\n  if (raw) return res as unknown as T;\n\n  // 204 / 205 — no body.\n  if (res.status === 204 || res.status === 205) return undefined as T;\n\n  let json: unknown = null;\n  const text = await res.text();\n  if (text) {\n    try {\n      json = JSON.parse(text);\n    } catch {\n      // Not JSON — surface as a generic error.\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        throw new ApiError(res.status, \"non_json_response\", res.headers.get(\"X-Request-Id\"), text.slice(0, 200));\n      }\n      return text as unknown as T;\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (!res.ok) {\n    const body = (json ?? {}) as { error?: string; request_id?: string };\n    throw new ApiError(\n      res.status,\n      body.error ?? `http_${res.status}`,\n      body.request_id ?? res.headers.get(\"X-Request-Id\"),\n    );\n  }\n\n  return json as T;\n}\n","/**\n * System / health / license / audit endpoints. All back the corresponding\n * v0.3.0 / Phase 2 admin pages.\n */\n\nimport { request } from \"./client\";\n\n// --- health ------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface HealthzResponse { status: \"ok\" }\nexport interface ReadyzResponse { status: \"ready\" | \"db_unavailable\" }\n\nexport function healthz(): Promise<HealthzResponse> {\n  return request(\"/healthz\", { noAuth: true, timeoutMs: 3000 });\n}\nexport function readyz(): Promise<ReadyzResponse> {\n  return request(\"/readyz\", { noAuth: true, timeoutMs: 3000 });\n}\n\n// --- system / license / audit -----------------------------------------\n\nexport interface SystemInfo {\n  name: string;\n  version: string;\n  uptime_at: string;\n}\nexport function systemInfo(): Promise<SystemInfo> {\n  return request(\"/api/v1/admin/system\");\n}\n\nexport interface License {\n  tier: string;\n  features: string[];\n  max_servers?: number;\n  expires_at?: number;\n  issued_at?: number;\n  grace_days?: number;\n}\nexport function license(): Promise<License> {\n  return request(\"/api/v1/admin/license\");\n}\n\nexport interface LicenseRenewal {\n  tier: string;\n  expires_at: string;\n  days_remaining: number;\n  grace_days: number;\n  status: \"active\" | \"grace\" | \"expired\";\n  // The handler also returns contact + sign URLs when available; The bootstrap <script> in\n * index.html applies the class *before* paint to avoid a flash.\n */\n\nimport { create } from \"zustand\";\nimport { persist } from \"zustand/middleware\";\n\nexport type Theme = \"light\" | \"dark\";\n\ninterface ThemeState {\n  theme: Theme;\n  setTheme: (t: Theme) => void;\n  toggle: () => void;\n}\n\nfunction applyToDocument(theme: Theme) {\n  const root = document.documentElement;\n  if (theme === \"dark\") root.classList.add(\"dark\");\n  else root.classList.remove(\"dark\");\n  root.style.colorScheme = theme;\n}\n\nexport const useThemeStore = create<ThemeState>()(\n  persist(\n    (set, get) => ({\n      theme: \"light\",\n      setTheme: (t) => {\n        applyToDocument(t);\n        set({ theme: t });\n      },\n      toggle: () => {\n        const next: Theme = get().theme === \"dark\" ? \"light\" : \"dark\";\n        applyToDocument(next);\n        set({ theme: next });\n      },\n    }),\n    {\n      name: \"orvix.theme\",\n      onRehydrateStorage: () => (state) => {\n        if (state) applyToDocument(state.theme);\n      },\n    },\n  ),\n);\n","/**\n * Dropdown — a controlled, click-outside-to-close popover.\n *\n * We avoid a 3rd-party headless lib for the v0.2.3 foundation. The\n * menu is keyboard-navigable (Up/Down/Enter/Escape) but uses the\n * native focus management; upgrade path is to swap in Radix /\n * @headlessui later without changing call sites.\n */\n\nimport { useEffect, useRef, useState, type ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport { cn } from \"./cn\";\n\nexport interface DropdownItem {\n  key: string;\n  label: ReactNode;\n  onClick: () => void;\n  destructive?: boolean;\n  disabled?: boolean;\n  icon?: ReactNode;\n}\n\nexport function Dropdown({\n  trigger,\n  items,\n  align = \"right\",\n}: {\n  trigger: (open: boolean) => ReactNode;\n  items: DropdownItem[];\n  align?: \"left\" | \"right\";\n}) {\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const root = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const btn = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!open) return;\n    const onDoc = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (root.current && !root.current.contains(e.target as Node)) setOpen(false);\n    };\n    const onKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {\n      if (e.key === \"Escape\") {\n        setOpen(false);\n        btn.current?.focus();\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", onDoc);\n    document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", onKey);\n    return () => {\n      document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", onDoc);\n      document.removeEventListener(\"keydown\", onKey);\n    };\n  }, [open]);\n\n  return (\n    <div ref={root} className=\"relative inline-block\">\n      <button\n        ref={btn}\n        type=\"button\"\n        onClick={() => setOpen((o) => !o)}\n        aria-haspopup=\"menu\"\n        aria-expanded={open}\n        className=\"rounded-md outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-500/60\"\n      >\n        {trigger(open)}\n      </button>\n      {open && (\n        <div\n          role=\"menu\"\n          className={cn(\n            \"absolute z-50 {items.map((it) => (\n            <button\n              key={it.key}\n              type=\"button\"\n              role=\"menuitem\"\n              disabled={it.disabled}\n              onClick={() text-sm\",\n                \"hover:bg-surface-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed\",\n                it.destructive ? \"text-danger\" : \"text-ink-1\",\n              )}\n            >\n              {it.icon}\n              {it.label}\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","import { type ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport { cn }            \"h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full\",\n            tone === \"success\" && \"bg-success\",\n            tone === \"warning\" && \"bg-warning\",\n            tone === \"danger\"  && \"bg-danger\",\n No mock data.\n */\n\nimport { useState, type FormEvent, type ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport { useQuery } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { useNavigate } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { systemKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\nimport { healthz, licenseRenewal } from \"@/lib/api/system\";\nimport { useThemeStore } from \"@/lib/theme/store\";\nimport { useAuthStore } from \"@/lib/auth/store\";\nimport { Dropdown } from \"./Dropdown\";\nimport { StatusPill } from \"./StatusPill\";\nimport { logout as apiLogout } from \"@/lib/api/auth\";\nimport { cn } from \"./cn\";\n\nexport function Topbar({ breadcrumbs }: { breadcrumbs?: ReactNode }) {\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const { theme, toggle } = useThemeStore();\n  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user);\n  const clearAuth = useAuthStore((s) => s.clear);\n\n  // Light polling: license + healthz. The list\n    // page is local-filtered (no search-param wiring). Future\n    // versions add a global command palette (Cmd-K).\n    navigate({ to: \"/accounts\" });\n  };\n\n  const onLogout = async () => {\n    try {\n      await apiLogout();\n    } catch {\n      // ignore — the local store is the source of truth post-logout\n    }\n    clearAuth();\n    navigate({ to: \"/login\" });\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <header\n      className={cn(\n        \"flex h-14 shrink-0 items-center gap-3 border-b border-surface-border bg-surface-1\",\n        \"px-4\",\n      )}\n    >\n      {/* breadcrumbs */}\n      <div className=\"min-w-0 flex-1 truncate\">{breadcrumbs}</div>\n\n      {/* search */}\n      <form onSubmit={onSearch} className=\"hidden md:block w-72\">\n        <div className=\"relative\">\n          <input\n            type=\"search\"\n            placeholder=\"Search accounts, domains…\"\n            value={query}\n            onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n            className={cn(\n              \"w-full rounded-md border border-surface-border bg-surface-0\",\n              \"py-1.5 pl-8 pr-3 text-sm placeholder:text-ink-4\",\n              \"focus:border-brand-500 focus:outline-none\",\n            )}\n          />\n          <svg\n            xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"\n            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            fill=\"none\"\n            stroke=\"currentColor\"\n            strokeWidth=\"1.8\"\n            className=\"absolute left-2.5 top-2 h-4 w-4 text-ink-3\"\n          >\n            <circle cx=\"11\" cy=\"11\" r=\"7\" />\n            <path d=\"m20 20-3.5-3.5\" />\n          </svg>\n        </div>\n      </form>\n\n      {/* status pill (healthz) */}\n      <StatusPill\n        tone={hz.data?.status === \"ok\" ? Renders an array of {label, to?} as a slash-\n * separated nav. If `to` is omitted the crumb is rendered as plain\n * text (terminal crumb). The router's useMatchRoute is used to\n * highlight the active route in the sidebar; the breadcrumbs are\n * route-derived (each page passes a list).\n */\nexport interface Crumb {\n  label: ReactNode;\n  to?: string;\n}\n\nexport function Breadcrumbs({ items }: { items: Crumb[] }) {\n  if (items.length === 0) return null;\n  return (\n    <nav aria-label=\"Breadcrumb\" className=\"flex items-center text-xs text-ink-3\">\n      {items.map((c, i) => (\n        <span key={i} className=\"flex items-center\">\n          {i > 0 && <span className=\"mx-1.5 text-ink-4\">/</span>}\n          {c.to ?   ) : (\n            <span className=\"px-1 py-0.5 text-ink-2\">{c.label}</span>\n          )}\n        </span>\n      ))}\n    </nav>\n  );\n}\n\n/** Convenience: build breadcrumbs from a pathname crumbs: Crumb[] = [{ label: \"Home\", to: \"/\" }];\n  let acc = \"\";\n  for (const p of parts) {\n    acc += `/${p}`;\n    const label = labelMap[p] ?? p;\n    const isLast = acc === path;\n    crumbs.push({ label, to: isLast ? undefined : acc });\n  }\n  return crumbs;\n}\n\nexport function SidebarItem({\n  to,\n  label,\n  icon,\n  end,\n}: {\n  to: string;\n  label: string;\n  icon?: notifications from anywhere in the app.\n */\n\nimport { create } from \"zustand\";\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\n\nexport type NotificationType = \"success\" | \"error\" | \"warning\" | \"info\";\n\nexport interface Notification {\n  id: string;\n  type: NotificationType;\n  title: string;\n  message?: string;\n  duration?: number;\n}\n\ninterface NotificationState {\n  notifications: Notification[];\n  add: (notification: Omit<Notification, \"id\">) => string;\n  remove: (id: string) => void;\n  clear: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const useNotificationStore = create<NotificationState>((set) => ({\n  notifications: [],\n  add: (notification) => {\n    const id = `notification-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`;\n    const newNotification = { ...notification, id };\n    set((state) => ({\n      notifications: [...state.notifications, newNotification],\n    }));\n    return id;\n  },\n  remove: (id) => {\n    set((state) => ({\n      notifications: state.notifications.filter((n) => n.id !== id),\n    }));\n  },\n  clear: () => set({ notifications: [] }),\n}));\n\n// Hook to show notifications easily\nexport function useNotification() {\n  const add = useNotificationStore((s) => s.add);\n\n  return useCallback(\n    (type: NotificationType, title: string, message?: string, duration = 5000) => {\n      return add({ type, title, message, duration });\n    },\n    [add],\n  );\n}\n\n// Notification container component - renders all active notifications\nexport function NotificationContainer() {\n  const notifications = useNotificationStore((s) => s.notifications);\n  const remove = useNotificationStore((s) => s.remove);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"fixed bottom-4 right-4 z-50 flex flex-col gap-2 max-w-sm\">\n      {notifications.map((notification) => (\n        <NotificationToast\n          key={notification.id}\n          notification={notification}\n          onDismiss={() => remove(notification.id)}\n        />\n      ))}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction NotificationToast({\n  notification,\n  onDismiss,\n}: {\n  notification: Notification;\n  onDismiss: () => void;\n}) {\n  const [isExiting, setIsExiting] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (notification.duration && notification.duration > 0) {\n      const timer = setTimeout(() => {\n        setIsExiting(true);\n        setTimeout(onDismiss, 200);\n      }, notification.duration);\n      return () => clearTimeout(timer);\n    }\n  }, error: \"text-danger\",\n    warning: \"text-warning\",\n    info: \"text-info\",\n  };\n\n  const bgColors = {\n    success: \"bg-success/10 border-success/30\",\n    error: \"bg-danger/10 <line x1=\"9\" y1=\"9\" x2=\"15\" y2=\"15\" />\n            </svg>\n          )}\n          {notification.type === \"warning\" && (\n            <svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" viewBox=\"0 0 </div>\n  );\n}","/**\n * AppLayout — the chrome shared by every authenticated page.\n *\n * Composed of:\n *   - Sidebar (left, persistent)\n *   - Topbar   (top, persistent) with breadcrumbs / search / status /\n *              license pill / theme / notifications / user menu\n *   - Outlet   (the page content)\n *\n * Route Guard:\n *   - Checks for valid access token on every navigation\n *   - Redirects unauthenticated users to /login\n *   - Warns users with expiring tokens (5 minutes before expiry)\n *   - Handles session expiration gracefully with notification\n *\n * The login page is rendered WITHOUT this chrome (it has\n * its own minimal layout).\n */\n\nimport { Outlet, useRouterState } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport { Sidebar } from \"@/lib/ui/Sidebar\";\nimport { Topbar } from \"@/lib/ui/Topbar\";\nimport { Breadcrumbs, useBreadcrumbsFromPath } from \"@/lib/ui/Breadcrumbs\";\nimport { useAuthStore } from \"@/lib/auth/store\";\nimport { useNotification } from \"@/lib/ui/Notification\";\n\nconst labelMap: Record<string, string> = {\n  accounts: \"Accounts\",\n  domains: \"Domains\",\n  deployments: \"Deployments\",\n  \"system-health\": \"System Health\",\n  \"audit-log\": \"Audit Log\",\n  settings: \"Settings\",\n  new: \"New\",\n  usage: \"Usage\",\n};\n\n// JWT token expiry check interval (30 seconds)\nconst SESSION_CHECK_INTERVAL = 30_000;\n// Warn user 5 minutes before token expires\nconst EXPIRY_WARNING_MS = 5 * 60 * 1_000;\n\nfunction parseJWTExpiry(token: string): number | null {\n  try {\n    const payload = JSON.parse(atob(token.split(\".\")[1]));\n    return payload.exp ? payload.exp * 1_000 : null;\n  } catch {\n    return null;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function AppLayout() {\n  const pathname = useRouterState({ select: (s) => s.location.pathname });\n  const accessToken = useAuthStore((s) => s.accessToken);\n  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user);\n  const clear = useAuthStore((s) => s.clear);\n  const notify = useNotification();\n\n  const hasWarnedRef = useRef(false);\n  const expiryWarningShownRef = useRef(false);\n\n  // Session expiry monitoring\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!accessToken) return;\n\n    const checkSession = () => {\n      const expiry = parseJWTExpiry(accessToken);\n      if (!expiry) return;\n\n      const now = Date.now();\n      const timeUntilExpiry = expiry - now;\n\n      // Token is expired or about to expire\n      if (timeUntilExpiry <= 0) {\n        clear();\n        notify(\"warning\", \"Session Expired\", \"Your session has expired. Please log in again.\");\n        void import(\"@/router\").then((m) => m.router.navigate({ to: \"/login\" }));\n        return;\n      }\n\n      // Warn user 5 minutes before expiry (only once)\n      if (timeUntilExpiry <= EXPIRY_WARNING_MS && !expiryWarningShownRef.current) {\n        expiryWarningShownRef.current = true;\n        const minutesLeft = Math.ceil(timeUntilExpiry / 60_000);\n        notify(\"warning\", \"Session Expiring Soon\", `Your session will expire in ${minutesLeft} minute${minutesLeft !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}. Save your work.`);\n      }\n    };\n\n    // Check immediately\n    checkSession();\n\n    // Set up interval for periodic checks\n    const intervalId = setInterval(checkSession, SESSION_CHECK_INTERVAL);\n    return () => clearInterval(intervalId);\n  }, [accessToken, clear, notify]);\n\n  // Auth guard: redirect to login if not authenticated.\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!accessToken && !pathname.startsWith(\"/login\")) {\n      // Only warn once to avoid notification spam\n      if (!hasWarnedRef.current) {\n        hasWarnedRef.current = true;\n      }\n      void import(\"@/router\").then((m) => m.router.navigate({ to: \"/login\" }));\n    } else if (accessToken) {\n      hasWarnedRef.current = false;\n      expiryWarningShownRef.current = false;\n    }\n  }, [accessToken, pathname]);\n\n  if (!accessToken) {\n    return null; // The effect above will redirect.\n  }\n\n  const crumbs = useBreadcrumbsFromPath(pathname, labelMap);\n  // Inject the user email as a terminal crumb only on the dashboard.\n  if (pathname === \"/\" && user?.email) {\n    crumbs.push({ label: user.email });\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full\">\n      <Sidebar />\n      <div className=\"flex h-full min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col\">\n        <Topbar breadcrumbs={<Breadcrumbs items={crumbs} />} />\n        <main className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 scroll-surface\">\n          <Outlet />\n        </main>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","import { forwardRef, type ButtonHTMLAttributes, type ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport { cn } from \"./cn\";\n\nexport type ButtonVariant = \"primary\" | \"secondary\" | \"ghost\" | \"danger\" | \"outline\";\nexport type ButtonSize = \"sm\" | \"md\" | \"lg\";\n\nexport interface ButtonProps extends ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement> {\n  variant?: ButtonVariant;\n  size?: ButtonSize;\n  loading?: boolean;\n  leftIcon?: ReactNode;\n  rightIcon?: ReactNode;\n}\n\nconst variantClasses: Record<ButtonVariant, string> = {\n  primary:\n    \"bg-brand-600 text-white hover:bg-brand-700 active:bg-brand-800 disabled:bg-brand-600/60\",\n  secondary:\n    \"bg-surface-2 text-ink-1 hover:bg-surface-3 border border-surface-border disabled:opacity-60\",\n  ghost:\n    \"bg-transparent text-ink-2 hover:bg-surface-2 hover:text-ink-1 disabled:opacity-60\",\n  danger:\n    \"bg-danger disabled:opacity-60\",\n};\n\nconst sizeClasses: Record<ButtonSize, string> = {\n  sm: \"h-8 px-3 text-xs gap-1.5\",\n  md: \"h-9 px-3.5 text-sm gap-2\",\n  lg: \"h-11 px-5 text-base gap-2\",\n};\n\nexport const Button = forwardRef<HTMLButtonElement, ButtonProps>(function Button(\n  { className, variant = \"primary\", size = \"md\", loading, leftIcon, rightIcon, children, font-medium\",\n        \"transition-colors duration-100 select-none\",\n        \"disabled:cursor-not-allowed\",\n        variantClasses[variant],\n        sizeClasses[size],\n        className,\n      )}\n      {...rest}\n    >\n      {loading ? Please try again.\",\n};\n\nexport function LoginPage() {\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const setTokens = useAuthStore((s) => s.setTokens);\n  const setUser = useAuthStore((s) => s.setUser);\n  const theme = useThemeStore((s) => s.theme);\n  const toggleTheme = useThemeStore((s) => s.toggle);\n\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState(\"\");\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const mut = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (vars: { email: string; password: string }) => login(vars.email, vars.password),\n    onSuccess: (res) => {\n      setTokens({\n        accessToken: res.access_token,\n        refreshToken: res.refresh_token,\n        expiresAt: res.expires_at,\n      });\n      setUser(res.user);\n      navigate({ to: \"/\" });\n    },\n  });\n\n  const onSubmit = (e: FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    mut.mutate({ email, password });\n  };\n\n  const errMsg =\n    mut.error instanceof ApiError\n      ? errorMessages[mut.error.code] ?? `Login failed (${mut.error.code}).`\n      : mut.error\n        ? \"Network error. Please try again.\"\n        : null;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"grid h-full place-items-center bg-surface-0\">\n      <div className=\"absolute right-4 top-4\">\n        <Button border border-surface-border bg-surface-1 p-6 shadow-card\">\n        <div className=\"mb-5 flex items-center gap-2\">\n          <div className=\"grid h-8 w-8 place-items-center rounded-md placeholder=\"admin@orvixpanel.local\"\n            required\n          />\n          <Input\n            label=\"Password\"\n            name=\"password\"\n            type=\"password\"\n            autoComplete=\"current-password\"\n            value={password}\n            onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}\n            required\n          />\n\n          {errMsg && (\n </Button>\n        </form>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","import { type ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport { cn } from \"./cn\";\n\nexport function Card({\n  children,\n  className,\n  padding = \"md\",\n}: {\n  children: ReactNode;\n  className?: string;\n  padding?: \"none\" | \"sm\" | \"md\" | \"lg\";\n}) {\n  const p = padding === \"none\" ? \"\" : padding === \"sm\" ? \"p-3\" : / Empty / Error primitives.\n *\n * The UI library exposes three distinct states so pages have a\n * consistent shape regardless of where the data is coming from.\n *\n *   - LoadingState — full-page or inline loading shell.\n *   - EmptyState   — \"0 records\" with an optional CTA. NEVER shows\n *                    placeholder metrics or fake counts.\n *   - ErrorState   — \"request failed\" with an optional Retry.\n */\n\nimport { type ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport { cn } from \"./cn\";\n\nexport function Spinner({ size = 20 }: { size?: number }) {\n  return (\n    <span\n      className=\"inline-block animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-brand-500 border-r-transparent\"\n      style={{ width: size, height: size }}\n      aria-label=\"Loading\"\n    />\n  );\n}\n\n/** Full-page or section loading shell. */\nexport function LoadingState({\n  message = \"Loading…\",\n  full = true,\n}: {\n  message?: ReactNode;\n  full?: boolean;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <div\n      className={cn(\n        \"flex items-center justify-center text-sm text-ink-3\",\n        full ? \"min-h-[40vh]\" : \"py-12\",\n      )}\n      role=\"status\"\n    >\n      <Spinner size={20} />\n      <span className=\"ml-2\">{message}</span>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nexport function EmptyState({\n  title,\n  description,\n  action,\n  icon,\n}: {\n  title: ReactNode;\n  description?: ReactNode;\n  action?: ReactNode;\n  icon?: ReactNode;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 py-12 text-center\">\n      {icon && <div className=\"mb-3 text-ink-3\">{icon}</div>}\n      <h3 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-ink-1\">{title}</h3>\n      {description && <p className=\"mt-1 max-w-md text-sm text-ink-3\">{description}</p>}\n      {action && <div className=\"mt-4\">{action}</div>}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nexport function ErrorState({\n  title = \"Something went wrong\",\n  description,\n  onRetry,\n}: {\n  title?: ReactNode;\n  description?: ReactNode;\n  onRetry?: () => void;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-danger/30 bg-danger/5 px-6 py-10 text-center\">\n      <div className=\"mb-2 grid h-8 w-8 place-items-center rounded-full bg-danger/10 text-danger font-bold\">!</div>\n      <h3 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-ink-1\">{title}</h3>\n      {description && <p className=\"mt-1 max-w-md text-sm text-ink-3\">{description}</p>}\n      {onRetry && (\n        <button\n          type=\"button\"\n          onClick={onRetry}\n          className=\"mt-4 inline-flex h-8 items-center rounded-md border border-surface-border bg-surface-1 px-3 text-xs font-medium text-ink-1 hover:bg-surface-2\"\n        >\n          Retry\n        </button>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nexport function Skeleton({ className }: { className?: string }) {\n  return <div className={cn(\"animate-pulse rounded bg-surface-3\", className)} />;\n}\n","/**\n * Accounts API. Dashboard. Real data only:\n *   - healthz + readyz\n *   - /api/v1/admin/system\n *   - /api/v1/admin/license\n *   - account count from /api/v1/accounts\n *   - domain count (aggregated per account)\n *   - deployment count (aggregated per account)\n *   - recent audit entries\n *\n * No placeholder metrics, no fake charts. Counts are derived from\n * the real lists; if the lists are empty, the page shows 0 and a\n * \"Get started\" CTA. The license card surfaces tier / days\n * remaining / status with the same shape as the renewal-info API.\n */\n\nimport { useMemo } from \"react\";\nimport { useQuery, useQueries } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Link } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { Card, CardHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { StatusPill } from \"@/lib/ui/StatusPill\";\nimport { Spinner } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport { systemKeys, accountKeys, domainKeys, auditKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\nimport {\n  healthz, readyz, systemInfo, licenseRenewal, listAudit,\n} from \"@/lib/api/system\";\nimport { listAccounts } from \"@/lib/api/accounts\";\nimport { listDomains } from \"@/lib/api/domains\";\nimport { listDeployments } from \"@/lib/api/deployments\";\nimport { useAuthStore } from \"@/lib/auth/store\";\nimport { sslKeys, getSSLDashboardStats } from \"@/lib/api/ssl\";\n\nexport function DashboardPage() {\n  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user);\n\n  const hz = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.healthz(), queryFn: healthz, refetchInterval: 15_000 });\n  const rz = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.readyz(), queryFn: readyz, refetchInterval: 15_000 });\n  const sys = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.info(), queryFn: systemInfo });\n  const lic = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.licenseRenewal(), queryFn: licenseRenewal });\n  const accts = useQuery({ queryKey: accountKeys.list(), queryFn: listAccounts });\n  const audit = useQuery({ queryKey: auditKeys.list(5), queryFn: () => listAudit(5) });\n  const sslStats = useQuery({ queryKey: sslKeys.dashboard(), queryFn: getSSLDashboardStats });\n\n  // Fetch domains and deployments for each account in parallel\n  const accounts = accts.data?.accounts ?? [];\n  const domainQueries = useQueries({\n    queries: accounts.map((a) => ({\n      queryKey: [...domainKeys.byAccount(a.id), \"dashboard-count\"],\n      queryFn: () => listDomains(a.id),\n      enabled: accts.isSuccess,\n    })),\n  });\n  const deploymentQueries = useQueries({\n    queries: accounts.map((a) => ({\n      queryKey: [\"deployments\", a.id, \"dashboard-count\"],\n      queryFn: () => listDeployments(a.id),\n      enabled: accts.isSuccess,\n    })),\n  });\n\n  // Calculate aggregated counts\n  const stats = useMemo(() => {\n    const domainCount = domainQueries.reduce((sum, q) => sum + (q.data?.domains.length ?? 0), 0);\n    const deploymentCount = deploymentQueries.reduce((sum, q) => sum + (q.data?.deployments.length ?? 0), 0);\n    const accountCount = accounts.length;\n    const activeCount = accounts.filter((a) => a.status === \"active\").length;\n    const suspendedCount = accounts.filter((a) => a.status === \"suspended\").length;\n    return { accountCount, activeCount, suspendedCount, domainCount, deploymentCount };\n  }, [accounts, domainQueries, deploymentQueries]);\n\n  const recentAuditEntries = audit.data?.entries ?? [];\n\n  // Calculate uptime string\n  const uptimeString = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!sys.data?.uptime_at) return null;\n    const start = new Date(sys.data.uptime_at).getTime();\n    const now = Date.now();\n    const diffMs = now - start;\n    const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60 * 60));\n    const diffDays = Math.floor(diffHours / 24);\n    if (diffDays > 0) return `${diffDays}d ${diffHours % 24}h`;\n    if (diffHours > 0) return `${diffHours}h`;\n    const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60));\n    return `${diffMins}m`;\n  }, [sys.data?.uptime_at]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title={`Welcome${user?.email ? `, ${user.email}` : \"\"}`}\n        description=\"Operational overview of your OrvixPanel instance.\"\n      />\n\n      {/* Top row — status tiles */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4\">\n        <StatusCard\n          label=\"API Health\"\n          value={hz.isLoading ? <Spinner size={18} /> : hz.data?.status === \"ok\" ? \"ok\" : \"down\"}\n          tone={hz.data?.status === \"ok\" ? \"success\" : \"danger\"}\n          badge=\"HTTP\"\n        />\n        <StatusCard\n          label=\"Database\"\n          value={rz.isLoading ? <Spinner size={18} /> : rz.data?.status ?? \"—\"}\n          tone={rz.data?.status === \"ready\" ? \"success\" : \"danger\"}\n          badge=\"DB\"\n        />\n        <StatusCard\n          label=\"License\"\n          value={lic.isLoading ? <Spinner size={18} /> : lic.data ? lic.data.tier.toUpperCase() : \"—\"}\n          tone={lic.data?.status === \"active\" ? \"success\" : lic.data?.status === \"grace\" ? \"warning\" : \"danger\"}\n          badge={lic.data?.status ?? \"—\"}\n          subtitle={lic.data ? `${lic.data.days_remaining}d remaining` : undefined}\n        />\n        <StatusCard\n          label=\"Uptime\"\n          value={uptimeString ?? (sys.isLoading ? <Spinner size={18} /> : \"—\")}\n          tone=\"neutral\"\n          badge=\"Runtime\"\n        />\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Second row — resource counts */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6\">\n        <MetricCard\n          label=\"Accounts\"\n          value={stats.accountCount}\n          isLoading={accts.isLoading}\n          href=\"/accounts\"\n          subtitle={`${stats.activeCount} active, ${stats.suspendedCount} suspended`}\n        />\n        <MetricCard\n          label=\"Domains\"\n          value={stats.domainCount}\n          isLoading={accts.isLoading || domainQueries.some((q) => q.isLoading)}\n          href=\"/domains\"\n        />\n        <MetricCard\n          label=\"Deployments\"\n          value={stats.deploymentCount}\n          isLoading={accts.isLoading || deploymentQueries.some((q) => q.isLoading)}\n          href=\"/deployments\"\n        />\n        <MetricCard\n          label=\"SSL Certs\"\n          value={sslStats.data?.total_active ?? Native <dialog> would be nicer\n * but its fullscreen / focus-restoration behavior across browsers\n * is still uneven in 2026; a div with role=\"dialog\" is predictable\n * for the enterprise use case.\n */\n\nimport { useEffect, type ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport { cn } from \"./cn\";\n\nexport function Modal({\n  open,\n  onClose,\n  title,\n  description,\n  children,\n  footer,\n  width = \"md\",\n}: {\n  open: boolean;\n  onClose: () => void;\n  title: ReactNode;\n  description?: ReactNode;\n  children: ReactNode;\n  footer?: ReactNode;\n  width?: \"sm\" | \"md\" | \"lg\" | \"xl\";\n}) {\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!open) return;\n    const onKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {\n      if (e.key === \"Escape\") onClose();\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", onKey);\n    const prev = document.body.style.overflow;\n    document.body.style.overflow = \"hidden\";\n    return () => {\n      document.removeEventListener(\"keydown\", onKey);\n      document.body.style.overflow = prev;\n    };\n  }, [open, onClose]);\n\n  if (!open) return null;\n  const w =\n    width === \"sm\" ? \"max-w-sm\" :\n    width === \"md\" ? \"max-w-md\" :\n    width === \"lg\" ? \"max-w-lg\" :\n                     \"max-w-2xl\";\n\n  return (\n    <div\n      className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-ink-1/40 backdrop-blur-sm\"\n      onClick={onClose}\n      role=\"presentation\"\n    >\n      <div\n        role=\"dialog\"\n        aria-modal=\"true\"\n        onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}\n        className={cn(\n          \"w-full rounded-lg border border-surface-border bg-surface-1 shadow-pop\",\n          w,\n        )}\n      >\n        <div className=\"px-5 pt-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-base font-semibold text-ink-1\">{title}</h2>\n          {description && <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-ink-3\">{description}</p>}\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"px-5 py-4\">{children}</div>\n        {footer && (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-end gap-2 border-t border-surface-border bg-surface-2 px-5 py-3\">\n            {footer}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","import { type ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport { cn } from \"./cn\";\n\nexport interface Column<T> {\n  key: string;\n  header: ReactNode;\n  cell: (row: T) => ReactNode;\n  width?: string;       // tailwind width class, e.g. \"w-32\"\n  align?: \"left\" | \"right\" | \"center\";\n  className?: string;\n}\n\nexport function Table<T>({\n  columns,\n  rows,\n  keyOf,\n  emptyState,\n  isLoading,\n  onRowClick,\n}: {\n  columns: Column<T>[];\n  rows: T[];\n  keyOf: (row: T) => string;\n  emptyState?: ReactNode;\n  isLoading?: boolean;\n  onRowClick?: (row: T) => void;\n}) {\n  if (isLoading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-12 text-sm text-ink-3\">\n        <span className=\"inline-block h-4 w-4 animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-brand-500 border-r-transparent\" />\n        <span className=\"ml-2\">Loading…</span>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (rows.length === 0 && emptyState) {\n    return <div className=\"py-8\">{emptyState}</div>;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-surface-border\">\n      <table className=\"w-full table-fixed key={c.key}\n                className={cn(\n                  \"px-4 py-2.5 font-medium\",\n                  c.align === \"right\" && \"text-right\",\n                  c.align === \"center\" && \"text-center\",\n                  c.width,\n                  c.className,\n                )}\n              >\n                {c.header}\n              </th>\n            ))}\n          </tr>\n \"bg-surface-1 hover:bg-surface-2\",\n                onRowClick && \"cursor-pointer\",\n              )}\n              onClick={onRowClick ? () => onRowClick(r) : undefined}\n            >\n              {columns.map((c) => (\n                <td\n                  key={c.key}\n                  className={cn(\n                    \"px-4 py-3 text-ink-1\",\n                    c.align === \"right\" && \"text-right\",\n                    c.align === \"center\" && \"text-center\",\n                  )}\n                >\n                  {c.cell(r)}\n                </td>\n              ))}\n            </tr>\n          ))}\n        </tbody>\n      </table>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","/**\n * Accounts list. [];\n\n  // Filter accounts\n  const filteredAccounts = useMemo(() => {\n    let result = accounts;\n\n    // Search filter\n    if (searchQuery) {\n      const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n      result = result.filter(\n        (a) =>\n          a.username.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||\n          (a.domain || \"\").toLowerCase().includes(query),\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Status filter\n    if (statusFilter !== \"all\") {\n      result = result.filter((a) => a.status === statusFilter);\n    }\n\n    return result;\n  }, [accounts, searchQuery, statusFilter]);\n\n  // Pagination\n  const totalPages = Math.ceil(filteredAccounts.length / PAGE_SIZE);\n  const paginatedAccounts = useMemo(() => {\n    const start = (currentPage - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    return filteredAccounts.slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE);\n  }, [filteredAccounts, currentPage]);\n\n  // Reset page when filters change\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setCurrentPage(1);\n  };\n\n  const handleStatusChange = (value: string) => {\n    setStatusFilter(value);\n    setCurrentPage(1);\n  };\n\n  // Mutations\n  const suspend = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => suspendAccount(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: accountKeys.all() });\n      setConfirmModal(null);\n    },\n  });\n  const unsuspend = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => unsuspendAccount(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: accountKeys.all() });\n      setConfirmModal(null);\n    },\n  });\n  const del = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => deleteAccount(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: accountKeys.all() });\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: domainKeys.all() });\n      setConfirmModal(null);\n    },\n  });\n\n  const handleConfirmAction = () => {\n    if (!confirmModal) return;\n    const { del.mutate(account.id);\n  };\n\n  const isActionPending = suspend.isPending || unsuspend.isPending || del.isPending;\n\n  const columns: Column<Account>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"username\",\n >\n          {a.username}\n        </Link>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"domain\",\n      header: \"Primary domain\",\n      cell: (a) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{a.domain || \"Disk\",\n      cell: (a) => (\n        <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">\n          {a.disk_used_mb != null ? `${a.disk_used_mb} / ${a.disk_quota_mb} MB` : `${a.disk_quota_mb} MB`}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"status\",\n      header: \"Status\",\n      cell: (a) => (\n        <StatusPill tone={a.status === \"active\" ? \"success\" : a.status === \"suspended\" ? \"warning\" : \"neutral\"}>\n          {a.status}\n        </StatusPill>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"created\",\n      header: \"Created\",\n      cell: (a) => <span className=\"font-mono (\n            <Button\n              variant=\"ghost\"\n              size=\"sm\"\n              onClick={() => setConfirmModal({ type: \"suspend\", account: a })}\n            >\n              Suspend\n            </Button>\n          ) : (\n            <Button\n              variant=\"ghost\"\n              size=\"sm\"\n              onClick={() => setConfirmModal({ type: \"unsuspend\", account: a })}\n            >\n              Unsuspend\n            </Button>\n          )}\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            className=\"text-danger\"\n            onClick={() => setConfirmModal({ type: \"delete\", account: a })}\n          >\n            Delete\n          </Button>\n        </div>\n      ),\n    },\n  ];\n\n  const confirmModalContent = confirmModal ? {\n    suspend: {\n      title: \"Suspend Account\",\n      description: `Are you sure you want to suspend \"${confirmModal.account.username}\"?
