This will permanently remove the system user and all associated domains. This action cannot be undone.`,\n      confirmText: \"Delete\",\n      confirmVariant: \"danger\" as const,\n    },\n  }[confirmModal.type] : null;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"Accounts\"\n        description={`${filteredAccounts.length} account${filteredAccounts.length === 1 ? \"\" : \"s\"} on this panel`}\n        actions={\n          <Button variant=\"primary\" onClick={() => navigate({ to: \"/accounts/new\" })}>\n            New account\n          </Button>\n        }\n      />\n\n      <Card>\n        {/* Filters */}\n        <div className=\"mb-4 flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-end\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <Input\n              label=\"Search\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              placeholder=\"Search by username, domain, or email…\"\n            />\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"w-full sm:w-48\">\n            <Select\n              label=\"Status\"\n              value={statusFilter}\n              onChange={(e) => handleStatusChange(e.target.value)}\n            >\n              <option value=\"all\">All statuses</option>\n              <option value=\"active\">Active</option>\n              <option value=\"suspended\">Suspended</option>\n            </Select>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {q.isError ? (\n          <ErrorState\n            description=\"Failed to load accounts.\"\n            onRetry={() => q.refetch()}\n          />\n        ) : (\n          <>\n            <Table\n              columns={columns}\n              rows={paginatedAccounts}\n              keyOf={(a) => a.id}\n              isLoading={q.isLoading}\n              emptyState={\n                <EmptyState\n                  title={searchQuery || statusFilter !== \"all\" ? \"No accounts match your filters\" : \"No accounts yet\"}\n                  description={\n                    searchQuery || statusFilter !== \"all\"\n                      ? \"Try adjusting your search or filters.\"\n                      : \"Create your first account to start serving sites.\"\n                  }\n                  action={\n                    !searchQuery && statusFilter === \"all\" && (\n                      <Button variant=\"primary\" onClick={() => navigate({ to: \"/accounts/new\" })}>\n                        Create account\n                      </Button>\n                    )\n                  }\n                />\n              }\n              onRowClick={(a) => navigate({ to: \"/accounts/$id\", params: { id: a.id } })}\n            />\n\n            {/* Pagination */}\n            {totalPages > 1 && (\n              <div className=\"mt-4 flex items-center justify-between border-t border-surface-border pt-4\">\n                <div className=\"text-sm text-ink-3\">\n                  Showing {(currentPage - 1) * PAGE_SIZE + 1} to{\" \"}\n                  {Math.min(currentPage * PAGE_SIZE, filteredAccounts.length)} of{\" \"}\n                  {filteredAccounts.length} accounts\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                  <Button\n                    variant=\"secondary\"\n                    size=\"sm\"\n                    disabled={currentPage === 1}\n                    onClick={() => setCurrentPage((p) => p - 1)}\n                  >\n                    Previous\n                  </Button>\n                  <Button\n                    variant=\"secondary\"\n                    size=\"sm\"\n                    disabled={currentPage === totalPages}\n                    onClick={() => setCurrentPage((p) => p + 1)}\n                  >\n                    Next\n                  </Button>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            )}\n          </>\n        )}\n      </Card>\n\n      {/* Confirmation Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={!!confirmModal}\n        onClose={() => !isActionPending && setConfirmModal(null)}\n        title={confirmModalContent?.title ?? \"\"}\n        description={confirmModalContent?.description}\n        width=\"md\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button\n              variant=\"secondary\"\n              onClick={() => setConfirmModal(null)}\n              disabled={isActionPending}\n            >\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant={confirmModalContent?.confirmVariant}\n              loading={isActionPending}\n              onClick={handleConfirmAction}\n            >\n              {confirmModalContent?.confirmText}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <div className=\"text-sm text-ink-2\">\n          {confirmModal?.type === \"delete\" && (\n            <div className=\"rounded-md border border-danger/30 bg-danger/5 p-3 text-danger\">\n              This action is irreversible and will permanently delete all data.\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </Modal>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","/**\n * New account form. Single page, single mutation. On success, redirect\n * to the new account's detail page.\n */\n\nimport { useState, type FormEvent } from \"react\";\nimport { useNavigate } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { useMutation, useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/lib/ui/Input\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { ApiError } from \"@/lib/api/client\";\nimport { createAccount } from \"@/lib/api/accounts\";\nimport { accountKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\n\nconst errorMap: Record<string, string> = {\n  missing_username: \"Username is required.\",\n  account_username_taken: \"That username is already taken.\",\n  hosting_linux_only: \"Account provisioning is only supported on Linux.\",\n  user_provision_failed: \"The system user could not be provisioned. Check server logs.\",\n  account_create_failed: \"Database insert failed. Check server logs.\",\n  invalid_body: \"Invalid request. Please review your inputs.\",\n};\n\nexport function NewAccountPage() {\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n  const [username, setUsername] = useState(\"\");\n  const [domain, setDomain] = useState(\"\");\n  const [plan, setPlan] = useState<\"basic\" | \"pro\" | \"unlimited\">(\"basic\");\n  const [diskQuotaMB, setDiskQuotaMB] = useState(10240);\n  const [bandwidthGB, setBandwidthGB] = useState(100);\n\n  const mut = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: () => createAccount({\n      username, domain, plan,\n      disk_quota_mb: diskQuotaMB,\n      bandwidth_gb: bandwidthGB,\n    }),\n    onSuccess: (account) => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: accountKeys.all() });\n      navigate({ to: \"/accounts/$id\", params: { id: account.id } });\n    },\n  });\n\n  const onSubmit = (e: FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    mut.mutate();\n  };\n\n  const errMsg =\n    mut.error instanceof ApiError\n      ? (mut.error.code.startsWith(\"user_provision_failed:\")\n          ? mut.error.code.replace(\"user_provision_failed:\", \"user_provision_failed: \")\n          : errorMap[mut.error.code] ?? `Failed (${mut.error.code})`)\n      : null;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"New account\"\n        description=\"Provisions a system user + a primary domain on this panel.\"\n      />\n\n      <Card>\n        <form onSubmit={onSubmit} className=\"grid max-w-2xl grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2\">\n          <Input\n            label=\"Username\"\n            value={username}\n            onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/g, \"\"))}\n            placeholder=\"alice\"\n            required\n            hint=\"Lowercase letters, digits, _ and -. Used as the Linux system user.\"\n          />\n          <Input\n            label=\"Primary domain\"\n            value={domain}\n            onChange={(e) => setDomain(e.target.value.toLowerCase())}\n            placeholder=\"alice.example.com\"\n            required\n            hint=\"First domain on the account. You can add more later.\"\n          />\n          <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n            <label className=\"text-xs font-medium text-ink-2\">Plan</label>\n            <div className=\"mt-1.5 grid grid-cols-3 gap-2\">\n              {([\"basic\", \"pro\", \"unlimited\"] as const).map((p) => (\n                <button\n                  key={p}\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  onClick={() => setPlan(p)}\n                  className={\n                    \"rounded-md border px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium capitalize \" +\n                    (plan === p\n                      ? \"border-brand-600 bg-brand-600/10 text-brand-600\"\n                      : \"border-surface-border bg-surface-1 text-ink-2 hover:bg-surface-2\")\n                  }\n                >\n                  {p}\n                </button>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <Input\n            label=\"Disk quota (MB)\"\n            type=\"number\"\n            min={100}\n            value={diskQuotaMB}\n            onChange={(e) => setDiskQuotaMB(parseInt(e.target.value || \"0\", 10))}\n          />\n          <Input\n            label=\"Bandwidth (GB)\"\n            type=\"number\"\n            min={0}\n            value={bandwidthGB}\n            onChange={(e) => setBandwidthGB(parseInt(e.target.value || \"0\", 10))}\n          />\n\n          {errMsg && (\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2 rounded-md border border-danger/30 bg-danger/5 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-danger\">\n              {errMsg}\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"md:col-span-2 flex justify-end gap-2\">\n            <Button type=\"button\" variant=\"ghost\" onClick={() => navigate({ to: \"/accounts\" })}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button type=\"submit\" variant=\"primary\" loading={mut.isPending}>\n              Create account\n            </Button>\n          </div>\n        </form>\n      </Card>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","/**\n * Tabs — local in-page tab strip, controlled. Used by pages that\n * have a fixed sub-navigation (Account detail, Settings).\n */\n\nimport { type ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport { cn } from \"./cn\";\n\nexport interface TabSpec {\n  key: string;\n  label: ReactNode;\n  panel: ReactNode;\n}\n\nexport function Tabs({\n  tabs,\n  active,\n  onChange,\n}: {\n  tabs: TabSpec[];\n  active: string;\n  onChange: (key: string) => void;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"flex border-b border-surface-border\">\n        {tabs.map((t) => {\n          const isActive = t.key === active;\n          return (\n            <button\n              key={t.key}\n              type=\"button\"\n              onClick={() => onChange(t.key)}\n              className={cn(\n                \"relative -mb-px border-b-2 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium transition-colors\",\n                isActive\n                  ? \"border-brand-600 text-brand-600 dark:border-brand-400 dark:text-brand-300\"\n                  : \"border-transparent text-ink-3 hover:text-ink-1\",\n              )}\n            >\n              {t.label}\n            </button>\n          );\n        })}\n      </div>\n      <div className=\"pt-4\">\n        {tabs.find((t) => t.key === active)?.panel}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","/**\n * Account detail. Tabs:\n *   - Overview   : real fields from /api/v1/accounts/:id (live disk\n *                  usage is recomputed on the server on each read)\n *   - Domains    : child route component, lists the account's domains\n *                  via /api/v1/accounts/:id/domains\n *   - Deployments: real list via the v0.2.3 /deployments endpoint\n *   - Usage      : raw /api/v1/accounts/:id/usage (the fields are\n *                  open-ended; we just dump them as a JSON panel)\n */\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, Link, useNavigate } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Card, CardHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { Tabs } from \"@/lib/ui/Tabs\";\nimport { StatusPill } from \"@/lib/ui/StatusPill\";\nimport { Spinner, ErrorState } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport { Table, type Column } from \"@/lib/ui/Table\";\nimport { accountKeys, domainKeys, deploymentKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\nimport { getAccount, accountUsage, suspendAccount, unsuspendAccount, deleteAccount } from \"@/lib/api/accounts\";\nimport { listDomains, deleteDomain, type Domain } from \"@/lib/api/domains\";\nimport { listDeployments, type Deployment } from \"@/lib/api/deployments\";\n\nexport function AccountDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams({ strict: false }) as { id: string };\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n  const [tab, setTab] = useState(\"overview\");\n\n  const q = useQuery({ queryKey: accountKeys.detail(id), queryFn: () => getAccount(id) });\n  const doms = useQuery({ queryKey: domainKeys.byAccount(id), queryFn: () => listDomains(id) });\n  const deps = useQuery({ queryKey: deploymentKeys.byAccount(id), queryFn: () => listDeployments(id) });\n  const usage = useQuery({ queryKey: accountKeys.usage(id), queryFn: () => accountUsage(id) });\n\n  const suspend = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: () => suspendAccount(id),\n    onSuccess: () => qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: accountKeys.all() }),\n  });\n  const unsuspend = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: () => unsuspendAccount(id),\n    onSuccess: () => qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: accountKeys.all() }),\n  });\n  const del = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: () => deleteAccount(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: accountKeys.all() });\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: domainKeys.all() });\n      navigate({ to: \"/accounts\" });\n    },\n  });\n\n  if (q.isLoading) {\n    return <div className=\"flex min-h-[40vh] items-center justify-center\"><Spinner size={28} /></div>;\n  }\n  if (q.isError || !q.data) {\n    return <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load account.\" onRetry={() => q.refetch()} />;\n  }\n\n  const a = q.data;\n  const actions = (\n    <>\n      {a.status === \"active\" ? (\n        <Button variant=\"secondary\" loading={suspend.isPending} onClick={() => suspend.mutate()}>\n          Suspend\n        </Button>\n      ) : (\n        <Button variant=\"secondary\" loading={unsuspend.isPending} onClick={() => unsuspend.mutate()}>\n          Unsuspend\n        </Button>\n      )}\n      <Button\n        variant=\"danger\"\n        loading={del.isPending}\n        onClick={() => {\n          if (window.confirm(`Delete account \"${a.username}\"? This also deletes the system user and all domains.`)) {\n            del.mutate();\n          }\n        }}\n      >\n        Delete\n      </Button>\n    </>\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title={\n          <span className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n            <span>{a.username}</span>\n            <StatusPill tone={a.status === \"active\" ? \"success\" : a.status === \"suspended\" ? \"warning\" : \"neutral\"}>\n              {a.status}\n            </StatusPill>\n          </span>\n        }\n        description={\n          <span>\n            <Link to=\"/accounts\" className=\"text-brand-600 hover:underline\">Accounts</Link>\n            <span className=\"mx-1.5 text-ink-4\">/</span>\n            <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{a.id}</span>\n          </span>\n        }\n        actions={actions}\n      />\n\n      <Tabs\n        active={tab}\n        onChange={setTab}\n        tabs={[\n          {\n            key: \"overview\",\n            label: \"Overview\",\n            panel: (\n              <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-3\">\n                <Card>\n                  <CardHeader title=\"Account\" />\n                  <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\">\n                    <Field label=\"Username\"  value={a.username} />\n                    <Field label=\"Plan\"      value={a.plan} />\n                    <Field label=\"Domain\"    value={a.domain || \"—\"} />\n                    <Field label=\"Tenant\"    value={a.tenant_id} mono />\n                    <Field label=\"Disk quota\" value={`${a.disk_quota_mb} MB`} />\n                    <Field label=\"Disk used\"  value={a.disk_used_mb != null ? `${a.disk_used_mb} MB` : \"—\"} />\n                    <Field label=\"Bandwidth\" value={`${a.bandwidth_gb} GB`} />\n                    <Field label=\"Created\"   value={new Date(a.created_at).toLocaleString()} />\n                  </dl>\n                </Card>\n                <Card className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n                  <CardHeader\n                    title=\"Usage\"\n                    description=\"From /api/v1/accounts/:id/usage. Schema is intentionally open; v0.4.0 will lock it down.\"\n                  />\n                  <pre className=\"overflow-x-auto rounded-md bg-surface-2 p-3 text-xs font-mono text-ink-1\">\n                    {usage.isLoading ? \"loading…\" : usage.isError ? \"error\" : JSON.stringify(usage.data ?? {}, null, 2)}\n                  </pre>\n                </Card>\n              </div>\n            ),\n          },\n          {\n            key: \"domains\",\n            label: `Domains (${doms.data?.domains.length ?? 0})`,\n            panel: <DomainsTab accountId={id} rows={doms.data?.domains ?? []} isLoading={doms.isLoading} onReload={() => doms.refetch()} />,\n          },\n          {\n            key: \"deployments\",\n            label: `Deployments (${deps.data?.deployments.length ?? 0})`,\n            panel: <DeploymentsTab rows={deps.data?.deployments ?? []} isLoading={deps.isLoading} onReload={() => deps.refetch()} />,\n          },\n        ]}\n      />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction Field({ label, value, mono }: { label: string; value: string; mono?: boolean }) {\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <dt className=\"text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wider text-ink-3\">{label}</dt>\n      <dd className={\"mt-0.5 text-sm text-ink-1 break-all \" + (mono ? \"font-mono\" : \"\")}>{value}</dd>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction DomainsTab({\n  accountId, rows, isLoading, onReload,\n}: { accountId: string; rows: Domain[]; isLoading: boolean; onReload: () => void }) {\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n  const del = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (d: string) => deleteDomain(accountId, d),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: domainKeys.byAccount(accountId) });\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: deploymentKeys.byAccount(accountId) });\n    },\n  });\n\n  const columns: Column<Domain>[] = [\n    { key: \"name\",   header: \"Domain\",       cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{d.name}</span> },\n    { key: \"doc\",    header: \"Document root\", cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{d.document_root}</span> },\n    { key: \"status\", header: \"Status\",       cell: (d) => <StatusPill tone={d.status === \"active\" ? \"success\" : \"neutral\"}>{d.status}</StatusPill> },\n    { key: \"created\", header: \"Created\",     cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{new Date(d.created_at).toLocaleString()}</span> },\n    {\n      key: \"actions\", header: \"\", align: \"right\",\n      cell: (d) => (\n        <Button\n          variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" className=\"text-danger\"\n          loading={del.isPending}\n          onClick={() => {\n            if (window.confirm(`Delete domain \"${d.name}\"?`)) del.mutate(d.name);\n          }}\n        >\n          Delete\n        </Button>\n      ),\n    },\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    <Card>\n      <div className=\"mb-3 flex items-center justify-between\">\n        <div className=\"text-sm text-ink-2\">Domains owned by this account.</div>\n        <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" onClick={onReload}>Refresh</Button>\n      </div>\n      <Table columns={columns} rows={rows} keyOf={(d) => d.id} isLoading={isLoading} />\n    </Card>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction DeploymentsTab({\n  rows, isLoading, onReload,\n}: { rows: Deployment[]; isLoading: boolean; onReload: () => void }) {\n  const columns: Column<Deployment>[] = [\n    { key: \"release\",    header: \"Release\",     cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{d.release}</span> },\n    { key: \"domain\",     header: \"Domain\",      cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{d.domain}</span> },\n    { key: \"is_current\", header: \"Current\",     cell: (d) => d.is_current ? <StatusPill tone=\"success\">current</StatusPill> : <span className=\"text-ink-3\">—</span> },\n    { key: \"size\",       header: \"Size\",        cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{formatBytes(d.size_bytes)}</span> },\n    { key: \"modified\",   header: \"Modified at\", cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{new Date(d.modified_at).toLocaleString()}</span> },\n  ];\n  return (\n    <Card>\n      <div className=\"mb-3 flex items-center justify-between\">\n        <div className=\"text-sm text-ink-2\">Release directories on disk. “Current” matches the document-root symlink.</div>\n        <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" onClick={onReload}>Refresh</Button>\n      </div>\n      <Table columns={columns} rows={rows} keyOf={(d) => `${d.domain}:${d.release}`} isLoading={isLoading} />\n    </Card>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction formatBytes(n: number): string {\n  if (!n) return \"0 B\";\n  const units = [\"B\", \"KB\", \"MB\", \"GB\", \"TB\"];\n  const i = Math.min(Math.floor(Math.log(n) / Math.log(1024)), units.length - 1);\n  return `${(n / Math.pow(1024, i)).toFixed(1)} ${units[i]}`;\n}\n","/**\n * Add Domain page. Wires the POST /api/v1/accounts/:id/domains route\n * to a single form. The route's \"name\" must be a valid FQDN per\n * internal/hosting.ValidateDomain; the WSL dev environment accepts\n * .local via ORVIX_ALLOW_LOCAL_TLD=1, the install sets this for dev.\n */\n\nimport { useState, type FormEvent } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useNavigate } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { useMutation, useQuery, useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/lib/ui/Input\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { ApiError } from \"@/lib/api/client\";\nimport { createDomain } from \"@/lib/api/domains\";\nimport { getAccount } from \"@/lib/api/accounts\";\nimport { accountKeys, domainKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\n\nconst errorMap: Record<string, string> = {\n  invalid_body: \"Invalid request. Please review your inputs.\",\n  invalid_domain: \"Domain name is not valid. Use a real FQDN, e.g. example.com.\",\n  domain_already_owned: \"This domain is already owned by another account on this panel.\",\n  domain_owned_by: \"This domain is already owned by another account on this panel.\",\n  create_failed: \"Failed to create the domain. Check server logs.\",\n  nginx_invalid: \"Generated nginx vhost failed validation. Check the nginx -t output in the server log.\",\n  php_invalid: \"Generated php-fpm pool failed validation. Check php-fpm -t output in the server log.\",\n  reload_failed: \"Domain was created but nginx/php-fpm reload failed. Check the server log.\",\n};\n\nexport function AddDomainPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams({ strict: false }) as { id: string };\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n  const [name, setName] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const acct = useQuery({ queryKey: accountKeys.detail(id), queryFn: () => getAccount(id) });\n\n  const mut = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: () => createDomain(id, { name: name.toLowerCase() }),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: domainKeys.byAccount(id) });\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: accountKeys.detail(id) });\n      navigate({ to: \"/accounts/$id\", params: { id } });\n    },\n  });\n\n  const onSubmit = (e: FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    mut.mutate();\n  };\n\n  const errMsg =\n    mut.error instanceof ApiError\n      ? (mut.error.code.startsWith(\"domain_\")\n          ? (errorMap[mut.error.code] ?? mut.error.code)\n          : (errorMap[mut.error.code] ?? `Failed (${mut.error.code})`))\n      : null;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title={`Add domain to ${acct.data?.username ?? \"…\"}`}\n        description={\n          <span>\n            <span className=\"text-ink-2\">Adds a new vhost + php-fpm pool to the account.</span>\n          </span>\n        }\n      />\n\n      <Card>\n        <form onSubmit={onSubmit} className=\"grid max-w-xl grid-cols-1 gap-4\">\n          <Input\n            label=\"Domain\"\n            value={name}\n            onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value.toLowerCase())}\n            placeholder=\"alice.example.com\"\n            required\n            hint=\"Fully qualified domain name. Must resolve to this server's IP in production; the v0.2.x dev environment accepts .local.\"\n          />\n\n          {errMsg && (\n            <div className=\"rounded-md border border-danger/30 bg-danger/5 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-danger\">\n              {errMsg}\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"flex justify-end gap-2\">\n            <Button type=\"button\" variant=\"ghost\" onClick={() => navigate({ to: \"/accounts/$id\", params: { id } })}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button type=\"submit\" variant=\"primary\" loading={mut.isPending}>\n              Add domain\n            </Button>\n          </div>\n        </form>\n      </Card>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","/**\n * Domains list. Cross-account view: for each account we fetch its\n * domains in parallel and merge the rows. For N accounts this is\n * N requests; v0.4.0 should add /api/v1/domains?account_id=… or a\n * /api/v1/domains aggregate. The UI is honest about the count.\n */\n\nimport { useQuery } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Link } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Table, type Column } from \"@/lib/ui/Table\";\nimport { StatusPill } from \"@/lib/ui/StatusPill\";\nimport { Spinner, ErrorState, EmptyState } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport { accountKeys, domainKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\nimport { listAccounts } from \"@/lib/api/accounts\";\nimport { listDomains, type Domain } from \"@/lib/api/domains\";\nimport { useQueries } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\n\nexport function DomainsListPage() {\n  const accts = useQuery({ queryKey: accountKeys.list(), queryFn: listAccounts });\n  const accounts = accts.data?.accounts ?? [];\n\n  // Fire a listDomains per account in parallel.\n  const domQueries = useQueries({\n    queries: accounts.map((a) => ({\n      queryKey: [...domainKeys.byAccount(a.id), \"for-domains-page\"] as const,\n      queryFn: () => listDomains(a.id),\n    })),\n  });\n\n  const isLoading = accts.isLoading || domQueries.some((q) => q.isLoading);\n  const isError   = accts.isError || domQueries.some((q) => q.isError);\n  const allDomains: Array<Domain & { account_username: string }> = [];\n  for (let i = 0; i < accounts.length; i++) {\n    const acct = accounts[i];\n    const r = domQueries[i];\n    if (!r?.data) continue;\n    for (const d of r.data.domains) allDomains.push({ ...d, account_username: acct.username });\n  }\n\n  const columns: Column<Domain & { account_username: string }>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"name\",\n      header: \"Domain\",\n      cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{d.name}</span>,\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"account\",\n      header: \"Account\",\n      cell: (d) => (\n        <Link to=\"/accounts/$id\" params={{ id: d.account_id }} className=\"text-brand-600 hover:underline\">\n          {d.account_username}\n        </Link>\n      ),\n    },\n    { key: \"doc\", header: \"Document root\", cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{d.document_root}</span> },\n    {\n      key: \"status\", header: \"Status\",\n      cell: (d) => <StatusPill tone={d.status === \"active\" ? \"success\" : \"neutral\"}>{d.status}</StatusPill>,\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"created\", header: \"Created\",\n      cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{new Date(d.created_at).toLocaleString()}</span>,\n    },\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"Domains\"\n        description=\"Every domain across every account on this panel.\"\n      />\n\n      <Card>\n        {isError ? (\n          <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load domains.\" onRetry={() => accts.refetch()} />\n        ) : isLoading ? (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-12 text-sm text-ink-3\">\n            <Spinner size={20} /> <span className=\"ml-2\">Loading…</span>\n          </div>\n        ) : allDomains.length === 0 ? (\n          <EmptyState\n            title=\"No domains yet\"\n            description=\"Create an account with a primary domain, or add a domain to an existing account.\"\n            action={\n              <Link to=\"/accounts/new\" className=\"inline-flex h-9 items-center rounded-md bg-brand-600 px-3.5 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-brand-700\">\n                New account\n              </Link>\n            }\n          />\n        ) : (\n          <Table columns={columns} rows={allDomains} keyOf={(d) => `${d.account_id}:${d.id}`} />\n        )}\n      </Card>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","/**\n * Deployments — cross-account view. Like Domains, fetches each\n * account's deployment list in parallel and merges.\n *\n * Empty state is honest: \"0 deployments across N accounts\" is the\n * real number; we don't fabricate charts or counters.\n */\n\nimport { useQuery, useQueries } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Link } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Table, type Column } from \"@/lib/ui/Table\";\nimport { StatusPill } from \"@/lib/ui/StatusPill\";\nimport { Spinner, ErrorState, EmptyState } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport { accountKeys, deploymentKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\nimport { listAccounts } from \"@/lib/api/accounts\";\nimport { listDeployments, type Deployment } from \"@/lib/api/deployments\";\n\nexport function DeploymentsListPage() {\n  const accts = useQuery({ queryKey: accountKeys.list(), queryFn: listAccounts });\n  const accounts = accts.data?.accounts ?? [];\n\n  const depQueries = useQueries({\n    queries: accounts.map((a) => ({\n      queryKey: [...deploymentKeys.byAccount(a.id), \"for-deployments-page\"] as const,\n      queryFn: () => listDeployments(a.id),\n    })),\n  });\n\n  const isLoading = accts.isLoading || depQueries.some((q) => q.isLoading);\n  const isError   = accts.isError || depQueries.some((q) => q.isError);\n\n  const all: Array<Deployment & { account_username: string }> = [];\n  for (let i = 0; i < accounts.length; i++) {\n    const acct = accounts[i];\n    const r = depQueries[i];\n    if (!r?.data) continue;\n    for (const d of r.data.deployments) all.push({ ...d, account_username: acct.username });\n  }\n  // Most-recent first.\n  all.sort((a, b) => b.modified_at.localeCompare(a.modified_at));\n\n  const columns: Column<Deployment & { account_username: string }>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"account\", header: \"Account\",\n      cell: (d) => (\n        <Link to=\"/accounts/$id\" params={{ id: d.account_id }} className=\"text-brand-600 hover:underline\">\n          {d.account_username}\n        </Link>\n      ),\n    },\n    { key: \"domain\",   header: \"Domain\",  cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{d.domain}</span> },\n    { key: \"release\",  header: \"Release\", cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{d.release}</span> },\n    {\n      key: \"current\", header: \"State\",\n      cell: (d) => d.is_current\n        ? <StatusPill tone=\"success\">current</StatusPill>\n        : <span className=\"text-ink-3\">archived</span>,\n    },\n    { key: \"size\",    header: \"Size\",    cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{formatBytes(d.size_bytes)}</span> },\n    { key: \"modified\", header: \"Modified\", cell: (d) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{new Date(d.modified_at).toLocaleString()}</span> },\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"Deployments\"\n        description=\"Release directories across every account.\"\n      />\n\n      <Card>\n        {isError ? (\n          <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load deployments.\" onRetry={() => accts.refetch()} />\n        ) : isLoading ? (\n          <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-12 text-sm text-ink-3\">\n            <Spinner size={20} /> <span className=\"ml-2\">Loading…</span>\n          </div>\n        ) : all.length === 0 ? (\n          <EmptyState\n            title=\"No releases yet\"\n            description={\n              accounts.length === 0\n                ? \"You don't have any accounts. Create one to start deploying.\"\n                : \"0 deployments across \" + accounts.length + \" account\" + (accounts.length === 1 ? \"\" : \"s\") + \". Releases are created on first deploy; see Releases / Rollback in the roadmap (v0.4.0).\"\n            }\n            action={\n              <Link to=\"/accounts/new\" className=\"inline-flex h-9 items-center rounded-md bg-brand-600 px-3.5 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-brand-700\">\n                New account\n              </Link>\n            }\n          />\n        ) : (\n          <Table columns={columns} rows={all} keyOf={(d) => `${d.account_id}:${d.domain}:${d.release}`} />\n        )}\n      </Card>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction formatBytes(n: number): string {\n  if (!n) return \"0 B\";\n  const units = [\"B\", \"KB\", \"MB\", \"GB\", \"TB\"];\n  const i = Math.min(Math.floor(Math.log(n) / Math.log(1024)), units.length - 1);\n  return `${(n / Math.pow(1024, i)).toFixed(1)} ${units[i]}`;\n}\n","/**\n * System Health page. Professional status page showing all system metrics.\n * Polls the public health probes + admin endpoints. No fake data.\n */\n\nimport { useMemo } from \"react\";\nimport { useQuery } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Card, CardHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { StatusPill } from \"@/lib/ui/StatusPill\";\nimport { Spinner, ErrorState } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport { systemKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\nimport { healthz, readyz, systemInfo, license, licenseRenewal } from \"@/lib/api/system\";\n\ninterface HealthMetric {\n  name: string;\n  status: \"healthy\" | \"degraded\" | \"down\" | \"unknown\";\n  endpoint: string;\n  description: string;\n  value?: string;\n  details?: unknown;\n}\n\nexport function SystemHealthPage() {\n  const hz = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.healthz(), queryFn: healthz, refetchInterval: 5_000 });\n  const rz = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.readyz(), queryFn: readyz, refetchInterval: 5_000 });\n  const sys = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.info(), queryFn: systemInfo, refetchInterval: 30_000 });\n  const lic = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.license(), queryFn: license });\n  const ren = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.licenseRenewal(), queryFn: licenseRenewal, refetchInterval: 30_000 });\n\n  // Build health metrics\n  const metrics = useMemo<HealthMetric[]>(() => {\n    const result: HealthMetric[] = [];\n\n    // API Health\n    result.push({\n      name: \"API Health\",\n      status: hz.isLoading ? \"unknown\" : hz.data?.status === \"ok\" ? \"healthy\" : \"down\",\n      endpoint: \"GET /healthz\",\n      description: \"HTTP liveness probe\",\n      value: hz.isLoading ? \"checking...\" : hz.data?.status ?? \"down\",\n    });\n\n    // Database\n    result.push({\n      name: \"Database\",\n      status: rz.isLoading ? \"unknown\" : rz.data?.status === \"ready\" ? \"healthy\" : \"degraded\",\n      endpoint: \"GET /readyz\",\n      description: \"Database connectivity and migrations\",\n      value: rz.isLoading ? \"checking...\" : rz.data?.status ?? \"down\",\n      details: rz.data as unknown,\n    });\n\n    // License\n    if (ren.data) {\n      result.push({\n        name: \"License\",\n        status: ren.data.status === \"active\" ? \"healthy\" : ren.data.status === \"grace\" ? \"degraded\" : \"down\",\n        endpoint: \"GET /api/v1/admin/license/renewal-info\",\n        description: `Tier: ${ren.data.tier}`,\n        value: `${ren.data.status} (${ren.data.days_remaining}d)`,\n      });\n    } else if (!ren.isLoading) {\n      result.push({\n        name: \"License\",\n        status: \"unknown\",\n        endpoint: \"GET /api/v1/admin/license/renewal-info\",\n        description: \"Unable to fetch license information\",\n        value: \"unknown\",\n      });\n    }\n\n    // System Build\n    if (sys.data) {\n      result.push({\n        name: \"System Build\",\n        status: \"healthy\",\n        endpoint: \"GET /api/v1/admin/system\",\n        description: `Version ${sys.data.version}`,\n        value: sys.data.name,\n      });\n    } else if (!sys.isLoading) {\n      result.push({\n        name: \"System Build\",\n        status: \"unknown\",\n        endpoint: \"GET /api/v1/admin/system\",\n        description: \"Unable to fetch system information\",\n        value: \"unknown\",\n      });\n    }\n\n    return result;\n  }, [hz, rz, sys, lic, ren]);\n\n  const overallStatus = useMemo(() => {\n    if (metrics.some((m) => m.status === \"down\")) return \"down\";\n    if (metrics.some((m) => m.status === \"degraded\")) return \"degraded\";\n    if (metrics.every((m) => m.status === \"healthy\")) return \"healthy\";\n    return \"unknown\";\n  }, [metrics]);\n\n  const statusTone = (status: HealthMetric[\"status\"]): \"success\" | \"warning\" | \"danger\" | \"neutral\" => {\n    switch (status) {\n      case \"healthy\": return \"success\";\n      case \"degraded\": return \"warning\";\n      case \"down\": return \"danger\";\n      default: return \"neutral\";\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"System Health\"\n        description=\"Live status of every layer the panel relies on. All values are real responses from the matching endpoint.\"\n      />\n\n      {/* Overall status banner */}\n      <div className={`rounded-lg border p-4 ${\n        overallStatus === \"healthy\" ? \"border-success/30 bg-success/5\" :\n        overallStatus === \"degraded\" ? \"border-warning/30 bg-warning/5\" :\n        overallStatus === \"down\" ? \"border-danger/30 bg-danger/5\" :\n        \"border-surface-border bg-surface-1\"\n      }`}>\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n          <StatusPill tone={statusTone(overallStatus)} className=\"text-sm\">\n            {overallStatus === \"healthy\" ? \"All Systems Operational\" :\n             overallStatus === \"degraded\" ? \"Degraded Performance\" :\n             overallStatus === \"down\" ? \"System Down\" : \"Checking...\"}\n          </StatusPill>\n          <span className=\"text-sm text-ink-2\">\n            {metrics.filter((m) => m.status === \"healthy\").length} of {metrics.length} services healthy\n          </span>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Health metrics grid */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3\">\n        {metrics.map((metric) => (\n          <Card key={metric.name}>\n            <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between\">\n              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-sm font-medium text-ink-1\">{metric.name}</h3>\n                  <StatusPill tone={statusTone(metric.status)} dot>\n                    {metric.status}\n                  </StatusPill>\n                </div>\n                <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-ink-3\">{metric.description}</p>\n                <p className=\"mt-1 font-mono text-xs text-ink-2\">{metric.endpoint}</p>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            {typeof metric.details === 'object' && metric.details !== null && (\n              <pre className=\"mt-3 overflow-x-auto rounded bg-surface-2 p-2 text-xs font-mono text-ink-1\">\n                {JSON.stringify(metric.details, null, 2)}\n              </pre>\n            )}\n          </Card>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Detailed info section */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 lg:grid-cols-2\">\n        <Card>\n          <CardHeader\n            title=\"API Health Check\"\n            description=\"GET /healthz — HTTP liveness probe\"\n            actions={\n              <StatusPill tone={hz.data?.status === \"ok\" ? \"success\" : \"danger\"}>\n                {hz.data?.status ?? \"down\"}\n              </StatusPill>\n            }\n          />\n          <pre className=\"overflow-x-auto rounded-md bg-surface-2 p-3 text-xs font-mono text-ink-1\">\n            {hz.data ? JSON.stringify(hz.data, null, 2) : hz.isLoading ? \"checking...\" : hz.error?.message ?? \"—\"}\n          </pre>\n        </Card>\n\n        <Card>\n          <CardHeader\n            title=\"Database Readiness\"\n            description=\"GET /readyz — Database ping and migration status\"\n            actions={\n              <StatusPill tone={rz.data?.status === \"ready\" ? \"success\" : \"danger\"}>\n                {rz.data?.status ?? \"down\"}\n              </StatusPill>\n            }\n          />\n          <pre className=\"overflow-x-auto rounded-md bg-surface-2 p-3 text-xs font-mono text-ink-1\">\n            {rz.data ? JSON.stringify(rz.data, null, 2) : rz.isLoading ? \"checking...\" : rz.error?.message ?? \"—\"}\n          </pre>\n        </Card>\n\n        <Card>\n          <CardHeader\n            title=\"System Information\"\n            description=\"GET /api/v1/admin/system\"\n            actions={\n              <StatusPill tone={sys.data ? \"success\" : \"neutral\"}>\n                {sys.data ? \"ok\" : sys.isError ? \"error\" : \"loading\"}\n              </StatusPill>\n            }\n          />\n          {sys.data ? (\n            <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\">\n              <Field label=\"Name\" value={sys.data.name} />\n              <Field label=\"Version\" value={sys.data.version} />\n              <Field label=\"Uptime at\" value={new Date(sys.data.uptime_at).toLocaleString()} />\n              <Field label=\"Started\" value={formatUptime(sys.data.uptime_at)} />\n            </dl>\n          ) : sys.isLoading ? (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-6\">\n              <Spinner size={18} />\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <ErrorState title=\"Failed to load\" onRetry={() => sys.refetch()} />\n          )}\n        </Card>\n\n        <Card>\n          <CardHeader\n            title=\"License Status\"\n            description=\"GET /api/v1/admin/license + /renewal-info\"\n            actions={ren.data && (\n              <StatusPill tone={ren.data.status === \"active\" ? \"success\" : ren.data.status === \"grace\" ? \"warning\" : \"danger\"}>\n                {ren.data.status}\n              </StatusPill>\n            )}\n          />\n          {lic.isLoading || ren.isLoading ? (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-6\">\n              <Spinner size={18} />\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\">\n              <Field label=\"Tier\" value={lic.data?.tier ?? \"—\"} />\n              <Field label=\"Features\" value={String(lic.data?.features?.length ?? 0)} />\n              <Field label=\"Max servers\" value={String(lic.data?.max_servers ?? \"—\")} />\n              <Field label=\"Days remaining\" value={ren.data ? String(ren.data.days_remaining) : \"—\"} />\n              <Field label=\"Grace days\" value={ren.data ? String(ren.data.grace_days) : \"—\"} />\n              <Field label=\"Expires\" value={lic.data?.expires_at ? new Date(lic.data.expires_at * 1000).toLocaleDateString() : \"—\"} />\n            </dl>\n          )}\n        </Card>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction Field({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <dt className=\"text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wider text-ink-3\">{label}</dt>\n      <dd className=\"mt-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-ink-1 break-all\">{value}</dd>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction formatUptime(uptimeAt: string): string {\n  const start = new Date(uptimeAt).getTime();\n  const diffMs = Date.now() - start;\n  const diffSeconds = Math.floor(diffMs / 1000);\n  const diffMinutes = Math.floor(diffSeconds / 60);\n  const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMinutes / 60);\n  const diffDays = Math.floor(diffHours / 24);\n\n  if (diffDays > 0) return `${diffDays}d ${diffHours % 24}h`;\n  if (diffHours > 0) return `${diffHours}h ${diffMinutes % 60}m`;\n  if (diffMinutes > 0) return `${diffMinutes}m`;\n  return `${diffSeconds}s`;\n}","/**\n * Audit Log page. Lists audit entries with filters, search, and pagination.\n * The \"Verify chain\" button hits /api/v1/admin/audit-log/verify and shows\n * a tamper banner if the chain breaks.\n *\n * The columns follow the models.AuditEntry shape: timestamp, user,\n * action, resource, result, ip. Each row is plain text; we don't\n * try to render an \"action icon\" because the action vocabulary is\n * not stable across versions.\n */\n\nimport { useState, useMemo } from \"react\";\nimport { useQuery, useMutation } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/lib/ui/Input\";\nimport { Select } from \"@/lib/ui/Select\";\nimport { Table, type Column } from \"@/lib/ui/Table\";\nimport { StatusPill } from \"@/lib/ui/StatusPill\";\nimport { ErrorState, EmptyState } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport { auditKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\nimport { listAudit, verifyAudit, type AuditEntry } from \"@/lib/api/system\";\n\nconst PAGE_SIZE = 25;\n\nexport function AuditLogPage() {\n  // Filters and pagination\n  const [limit, setLimit] = useState(100);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [resultFilter, setResultFilter] = useState<string>(\"all\");\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);\n\n  const q = useQuery({ queryKey: auditKeys.list(limit), queryFn: () => listAudit(limit) });\n  const verify = useMutation({ mutationFn: verifyAudit });\n\n  // Filter entries\n  const filteredEntries = useMemo(() => {\n    let entries = q.data?.entries ?? [];\n\n    // Search filter\n    if (searchQuery) {\n      const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n      entries = entries.filter(\n        (e) =>\n          e.action.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||\n          e.user_email?.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||\n          e.resource_type.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||\n          e.resource_name?.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||\n          e.actor_ip.toLowerCase().includes(query),\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Result filter\n    if (resultFilter !== \"all\") {\n      entries = entries.filter((e) => e.result === resultFilter);\n    }\n\n    return entries;\n  }, [q.data?.entries, searchQuery, resultFilter]);\n\n  // Pagination\n  const totalPages = Math.ceil(filteredEntries.length / PAGE_SIZE);\n  const paginatedEntries = useMemo(() => {\n    const start = (currentPage - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    return filteredEntries.slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE);\n  }, [filteredEntries, currentPage]);\n\n  // Reset page when filters change\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setCurrentPage(1);\n  };\n\n  const handleResultChange = (value: string) => {\n    setResultFilter(value);\n    setCurrentPage(1);\n  };\n\n  const handleLimitChange = (value: number) => {\n    setLimit(value);\n    setCurrentPage(1);\n  };\n\n  const columns: Column<AuditEntry>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"timestamp\",\n      header: \"When\",\n      cell: (e) => (\n        <div className=\"font-mono text-xs\">\n          <div>{new Date(e.timestamp).toLocaleDateString()}</div>\n          <div className=\"text-ink-3\">{new Date(e.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString()}</div>\n        </div>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"user\",\n      header: \"User\",\n      cell: (e) => (\n        <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\" title={e.user_id}>\n          {e.user_email || e.user_id.slice(0, 12) + \"...\"}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"action\",\n      header: \"Action\",\n      cell: (e) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{e.action}</span>,\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"resource\",\n      header: \"Resource\",\n      cell: (e) => (\n        <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\" title={e.resource_id}>\n          {e.resource_type}\n          {e.resource_name ? ` · ${e.resource_name}` : \"\"}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"result\",\n      header: \"Result\",\n      cell: (e) => (\n        <StatusPill tone={e.result === \"success\" ? \"success\" : e.result === \"denied\" ? \"warning\" : \"danger\"}>\n          {e.result}\n        </StatusPill>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"ip\",\n      header: \"IP\",\n      cell: (e) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{e.actor_ip}</span>,\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"hash\",\n      header: \"Hash\",\n      cell: (e) => <span className=\"font-mono text-[10px] text-ink-3\">{e.hash?.slice(0, 12) ?? \"—\"}</span>,\n    },\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"Audit Log\"\n        description={`${filteredEntries.length} entries — append-only, hash-chained record of every action.`}\n        actions={\n          <>\n            <Select\n              value={String(limit)}\n              onChange={(e) => handleLimitChange(parseInt(e.target.value, 10))}\n              className=\"w-24\"\n            >\n              <option value={50}>50</option>\n              <option value={100}>100</option>\n              <option value={200}>200</option>\n              <option value={500}>500</option>\n            </Select>\n            <Button\n              variant=\"secondary\"\n              onClick={() => verify.mutate()}\n              loading={verify.isPending}\n            >\n              Verify chain\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      />\n\n      {/* Verification status banner */}\n      {verify.data && (\n        <div\n          className={\n            \"rounded-md border px-4 py-3 text-sm \" +\n            (verify.data.tampered\n              ? \"border-danger/30 bg-danger/5 text-danger\"\n              : label=\"Search\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              placeholder=\"Search by action, user, resource, or IP…\"\n            />\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"w-full sm:w-40\">\n            <Select\n              label=\"Result\"\n              value={resultFilter}\n              onChange={(e) => handleResultChange(e.target.value)}\n            >\n              <option value=\"all\">All results</option>\n              <option value=\"success\">Success</option>\n              <option value=\"denied\">Denied</option>\n              <option value=\"error\">Error</option>\n            </Select>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {q.isError ? (\n          <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load audit log.\" onRetry={() => q.refetch()} />\n        ) : (\n          <>\n            <Table\n              columns={columns}\n  ? \"Try adjusting your search or filters.\"\n                      : \"Actions you take in the panel will appear here.\"\n                  }\n                />\n              }\n            />\n\n               {filteredEntries.length} entries\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                  <Button\n                    variant=\"secondary\"\n <Button\n                    variant=\"secondary\"\n                    size=\"sm\"\n                    disabled={currentPage === totalPages}\n                    onClick={() => setCurrentPage((p) => </div>\n  );\n}","import { type ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport { cn } from \"./cn\";\n\nexport type BadgeTone = \"neutral\" | \"info\" | \"success\" | \"warning\" | \"danger\" | \"brand\";\nexport type BadgeVariant = \"soft\" | \"solid\" | \"outline\";\n\nconst toneClasses: Record<BadgeVariant, Record<BadgeTone, string>> = {\n  // Soft (default) — translucent background + colored text.\n  soft: {\n    neutral: \"bg-surface-2 text-ink-2\",\n    info:    \"bg-info/10 text-info\",\n    success: \"bg-success/10 text-success\",\n    warning: \"bg-warning/10 text-warning\",\n    danger:  \"bg-danger/10 text-danger\",\n    brand:   \"bg-brand-600/10 text-brand-600 dark:text-brand-300\",\n  },\n  // Solid — fully filled.\n  solid: {\n    neutral: \"bg-ink-3 text-surface-0\",\n    info:    \"bg-info text-white\",\n    success: \"bg-success text-white\",\n    warning: \"bg-warning text-ink-1\",\n    danger:  \"bg-danger text-white\",\n    brand:   \"bg-brand-600 text-white\",\n  },\n  // Outline — border only.\n  outline: {\n    neutral: \"border border-surface-border text-ink-2\",\n    info:    \"border border-info/40 text-info\",\n    success: \"border border-success/40 text-success\",\n    warning: \"border border-warning/40 text-warning\",\n    danger:  \"border border-danger/40 text-danger\",\n    brand:   \"border border-brand-600/40 text-brand-600 dark:text-brand-300\",\n  },\n};\n\nexport function Badge({\n  tone = \"neutral\",\n  variant = \"soft\",\n  children,\n  className,\n  leftIcon,\n}: {\n  tone?: Settings page. The v0.3.0 enterprise UI ships a single\n * read-mostly Settings surface: the license status card. Operators\n * can also upload a new license key (PUT /api/v1/admin/license).\n *\n * Future modules (themes, API keys, RBAC roles, tenant quotas) plug\n * into this page as additional tabs without redesign.\n */\n\nimport { useState, type FormEvent } from \"react\";\nimport { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Card, CardHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Badge } from \"@/lib/ui/Badge\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/lib/ui/Input\";\nimport { Tabs } from \"@/lib/ui/Tabs\";\nimport { ErrorState, LoadingState } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport { systemKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\nimport { license, licenseRenewal, uploadLicense } from \"@/lib/api/system\";\nimport { ApiError } from \"@/lib/api/client\";\nimport { useAuthStore } from \"@/lib/auth/store\";\n\nexport function SettingsPage() {\n  const [tab, setTab] = useState(\"license\");\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"Settings\"\n        description=\"Operator configuration. Each tab is independent and reloadable.\"\n      />\n      <Tabs\n        active={tab}\n        onChange={setTab}\n        tabs={[\n          { key: \"license\", label: \"License\",       panel: <LicenseSettings /> },\n          { key: \"session\", label: \"Session\",        panel: <SessionInfo /> },\n        ]}\n      />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction LicenseSettings() {\n  const lic = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.license(),         queryFn: license });\n  const ren = useQuery({ queryKey: systemKeys.licenseRenewal(),  queryFn: licenseRenewal });\n  const [key, setKey] = useState(\"\");\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n\n  const mut = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: () => uploadLicense(key.trim()),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: systemKeys.license() });\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: systemKeys.licenseRenewal() });\n      setKey(\"\");\n    },\n  });\n\n  if (lic.isLoading || ren.isLoading) return <LoadingState />;\n  if (lic.isError || ren.isError) {\n    return <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load license.\" onRetry={() => { lic.refetch(); ren.refetch(); }} />;\n  }\n\n  const errMsg =\n    mut.error instanceof ApiError\n      ? mut.error.code.startsWith(\"license_parse_failed:\")\n        ? `Invalid license key: ${mut.error.code.replace(\"license_parse_failed:\", \"\")}`\n        : mut.error.code\n      : null;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 lg:grid-cols-3\">\n      <Card className=\"lg:col-span-2\">\n        <CardHeader\n          title=\"License\"\n          description=\"From /api/v1/admin/license and /renewal-info.\"\n          actions={\n            ren.data && (\n              <Badge tone={ren.data.status === \"active\" ? \"success\" : ren.data.status === \"grace\" ? \"warning\" : \"danger\"}>\n                {ren.data.status}\n              </Badge>\n            )\n          }\n        />\n        {lic.data && (\n          <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\">\n            <Field label=\"Tier\" value={lic.data.tier} />\n            <Field label=\"Features\" value={String(lic.data.features?.length ?? 0)} />\n            <Field label=\"Max servers\" value={String(lic.data.max_servers ?? \"—\")} />\n            <Field label=\"Grace days\" value={ren.data ? String(ren.data.grace_days) : \"—\"} />\n            <Field label=\"Issued at\" value={lic.data.issued_at ? new Date(lic.data.issued_at * 1000).toLocaleString() : \"—\"} />\n            <Field label=\"Expires at\" value={lic.data.expires_at ? new Date(lic.data.expires_at * 1000).toLocaleString() : \"—\"} />\n            <Field label=\"Days remaining\" value={ren.data ? String(ren.data.days_remaining) : \"—\"} />\n          </dl>\n        )}\n      </Card>\n\n      <Card>\n        <CardHeader title=\"Upload new key\" description=\"PUT /api/v1/admin/license\" />\n        <form\n          onSubmit={(e: FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); mut.mutate(); }}\n          className=\"space-y-3\"\n        >\n          <Input\n            label=\"License key\"\n            value={key}\n            onChange={(e) => setKey(e.target.value)}\n            placeholder=\"ORVIX-ENT-2026-XXXX-XXXX\"\n            hint=\"Format: ORVIX-{TIER}-{YEAR}-{HASH}-{SIG}\"\n          />\n          {errMsg && (\n            <div className=\"rounded-md border border-danger/30 bg-danger/5 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-danger\">\n              {errMsg}\n            </div>\n          )}\n          <Button type=\"submit\" variant=\"primary\" loading={mut.isPending} disabled={!key.trim()}>\n            Upload\n          </Button>\n        </form>\n      </Card>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction SessionInfo() {\n  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user);\n  return (\n    <Card>\n      <CardHeader title=\"Session\" description=\"Current operator. v0.3.0 has no other session settings.\" />\n      <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\">\n        <Field label=\"Email\" value={user?.email ?? \"—\"} />\n        <Field label=\"Role\"  value={user?.role ?? \"—\"} />\n      </dl>\n      <p className=\"mt-4 text-xs text-ink-3\">\n        Sign out from the top-right user menu. Future: passkey setup, MFA enrollment, API key management.\n      </p>\n    </Card>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction Field({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <dt className=\"text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wider text-ink-3\">{label}</dt>\n      <dd className=\"mt-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-ink-1 break-all\">{value}</dd>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","/**\n * DNS API. Maps 1:1 to the Go handlers in internal/api/v1/dns.go.\n *\n * The backend returns the full `DNSZone`, `DNSRecord`, `DNSZoneTemplate` JSON.\n */\n\nimport { request } from \"./client\";\n\n//
