[];\n\n  // Create mutation\n  const createMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (body: { domain: string; type?: DNSZoneType }) => createZone(body),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: dnsZoneKeys.all() });\n      setCreateModalOpen(false);\n      setNewZoneDomain(\"\");\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Delete mutation\n  const deleteMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => deleteZone(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: dnsZoneKeys.all() });\n      setDeleteModal(null);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Filter zones\n  const filteredZones = useMemo(() => {\n    let result = zones;\n\n    if (searchQuery) {\n      const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n      result = result.filter((z) => z.domain.toLowerCase().includes(query));\n    }\n\n    if (statusFilter !== \"all\") {\n      result = result.filter((z) => z.status === statusFilter);\n    }\n\n    return result;\n  }, [zones, searchQuery, statusFilter]);\n\n  // Pagination\n  const totalPages = Math.ceil(filteredZones.length / PAGE_SIZE);\n  const paginatedZones = useMemo(() => {\n    const start = (currentPage - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    return filteredZones.slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE);\n  }, [filteredZones, currentPage]);\n\n  // Reset page when filters change\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setCurrentPage(1);\n  };\n\n  const handleCreateZone = () => {\n    if (!newZoneDomain.trim()) return;\n    createMutation.mutate({\n      domain: newZoneDomain.trim(),\n      type: newZoneType,\n    });\n  };\n\n  // Table columns\n  const columns: Column<DNSZone>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"domain\",\n      header: \"Domain\",\n      cell: (zone) => (\n        <Link\n          to=\"/dns/zones/$id\"\n          params={{ id: zone.id }}\n          className=\"font-medium text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-400 dark:hover:text-blue-300\"\n        >\n          {zone.domain}\n        </Link>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"type\",\n      header: \"Type\",\n      cell: (zone) => (\n        <span className=\"capitalize text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">{zone.type}</span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"status\",\n      header: \"Status\",\n      cell: (zone) => (\n        <StatusPill tone={zone.status === \"active\" ? \"success\" : zone.status === \"suspended\" ? \"warning\" : \"neutral\"}>\n          {zone.status}\n        </StatusPill>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"records\",\n      header: \"Records\",\n      cell: () => <span className=\"text-gray-500\">—</span>,\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"created_at\",\n      header: \"Created\",\n      cell: (zone) => new Date(zone.created_at).toLocaleDateString(),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"actions\",\n      header: \"Actions\",\n      cell: (zone) => (\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            onClick={() => navigate({ to: \"/dns/zones/$id\", params: { id: zone.id } })}\n          >\n            View\n          </Button>\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            className=\"text-red-600 hover:text-red-800 dark:text-red-400\"\n            onClick={() => setDeleteModal(zone)}\n          >\n            Delete\n          </Button>\n        </div>\n      ),\n    },\n  ];\n\n  if (q.isLoading) return <LoadingState />;\n  if (q.isError) return <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load zones\" onRetry={() => q.refetch()} />;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"DNS Zones\"\n        description=\"Manage your DNS zones and records\"\n        actions={\n          <Button onClick={() => setCreateModalOpen(true)}>\n            Create Zone\n          </Button>\n        }\n      />\n\n      {/* Filters */}\n      <Card className=\"p-4\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-[200px]\">\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Search zones...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n          <Select\n            value={statusFilter}\n            onChange={(e) => {\n              setStatusFilter(e.target.value);\n              setCurrentPage(1);\n            }}\n            className=\"w-40\"\n          >\n            <option value=\"all\">All Status</option>\n            <option value=\"active\">Active</option>\n            <option value=\"suspended\">Suspended</option>\n            <option value=\"pending\">Pending</option>\n          </Select>\n        </div>\n      </Card>\n\n      {/* Table */}\n      {paginatedZones.length === 0 ? (\n        <EmptyState\n          title=\"No zones found\"\n          description={\n            searchQuery || statusFilter !== \"all\"\n              ? \"Try adjusting your filters\"\n              : \"Create your first DNS zone to get started\"\n          }\n          action={\n            !searchQuery && statusFilter === \"all\" ? (\n              <Button onClick={() => setCreateModalOpen(true)}>Create Zone</Button>\n            ) : undefined\n          }\n        />\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <Table<DNSZone> rows={paginatedZones} columns={columns} keyOf={(z) => z.id} />\n          {totalPages > 1 && (\n            <div className=\"flex justify-center gap-2\">\n              <Button\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                size=\"sm\"\n                disabled={currentPage === 1}\n                onClick={() => setCurrentPage((p) => p - 1)}\n              >\n                Previous\n              </Button>\n              <span className=\"px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">\n                Page {currentPage} of {totalPages}\n              </span>\n              <Button\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                size=\"sm\"\n                disabled={currentPage === totalPages}\n                onClick={() => setCurrentPage((p) => p + 1)}\n              >\n                Next\n              </Button>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Create Zone Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={createModalOpen}\n        onClose={() => setCreateModalOpen(false)}\n        title=\"Create DNS Zone\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setCreateModalOpen(false)}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              onClick={handleCreateZone}\n              disabled={!newZoneDomain.trim() || createMutation.isPending}\n            >\n              {createMutation.isPending ? \"Creating...\" : \"Create\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">Domain</label>\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"example.com\"\n              value={newZoneDomain}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewZoneDomain(e.target.value)}\n              onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === \"Enter\" && handleCreateZone()}\n            />\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">Type</label>\n            <Select\n              value={newZoneType}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewZoneType(e.target.value as DNSZoneType)}\n            >\n              <option value=\"native\">Native</option>\n              <option value=\"master\">Master</option>\n              <option value=\"slave\">Slave</option>\n            </Select>\n          </div>\n          {createMutation.isError && (\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">\n              Failed to create zone. Please check the domain name.\n            </p>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </Modal>\n\n      {/* Delete Confirmation Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={deleteModal !== null}\n        onClose={() => setDeleteModal(null)}\n        title=\"Delete DNS Zone\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setDeleteModal(null)}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant=\"danger\"\n              onClick={() => deleteModal && deleteMutation.mutate(deleteModal.id)}\n              loading={deleteMutation.isPending}\n            >\n              {deleteMutation.isPending ? \"Deleting...\" : \"Delete\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <p>\n          Are you sure you want to delete the zone{\" \"}\n          <strong>{deleteModal?.domain}</strong>? This action cannot be undone and\n          will remove all records in this zone.\n        </p>\n      </Modal>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// Re-export types for use in other components\nexport type { DNSZone } from \"@/lib/api/dns\";","/**\n * DNS Zone detail page with records management.\n *\n * Routes:\n *   /dns/zones                    ZonesListPage\n *   /dns/zones/:id                ZoneDetailPage\n *   /dns/templates                DNSTemplatesPage\n */\n\nimport { useState, useMemo } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, Link, useNavigate } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Card, CardHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/lib/ui/Input\";\nimport { Select } from \"@/lib/ui/Select\";\nimport { Modal } from \"@/lib/ui/Modal\";\nimport { Table, type Column } from \"@/lib/ui/Table\";\nimport { Tabs } from \"@/lib/ui/Tabs\";\nimport { StatusPill } from \"@/lib/ui/StatusPill\";\nimport { EmptyState, ErrorState, LoadingState } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport { dnsZoneKeys, dnsTemplateKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\nimport {\n  getZone,\n  deleteZone,\n  listRecords,\n  createRecord,\n  updateRecord,\n  deleteRecord,\n  listTemplates,\n  applyTemplate,\n  type DNSZone,\n  type DNSRecord,\n  type DNSRecordType,\n} from \"@/lib/api/dns\";\n\nconst RECORD_TYPES: DNSRecordType[] = [\"A\", \"AAAA\", \"CNAME\", \"MX\", \"TXT\", \"NS\", \"SRV\", \"CAA\"];\n\nconst PAGE_SIZE = 50;\n\nexport function ZoneDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams({ strict: false }) as { id: string };\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n  const [tab, setTab] = useState(\"records\");\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [typeFilter, setTypeFilter] = useState<string>(\"all\");\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);\n\n  // Modals\n  const [createModalOpen, setCreateModalOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [editModal, setEditModal] = useState<DNSRecord | null>(null);\n  const [deleteModal, setDeleteModal] = useState<DNSRecord | null>(null);\n  const [applyTemplateModal, setApplyTemplateModal] = useState(false);\n\n  // Form state\n  const [formName, setFormName] = useState(\"\");\n  const [formType, setFormType] = useState<DNSRecordType>(\"A\");\n  const [formContent, setFormContent] = useState(\"\");\n  const [formTTL, setFormTTL] = useState(\"3600\");\n  const [formPriority, setFormPriority] = useState(\"0\");\n  const [formDisabled, setFormDisabled] = useState(false);\n\n  // Zone query\n  const zoneQuery = useQuery({\n    queryKey: dnsZoneKeys.detail(id),\n    queryFn: () => getZone(id),\n  });\n\n  // Records query\n  const recordsQuery = useQuery({\n    queryKey: dnsZoneKeys.records(id),\n    queryFn: () => listRecords(id),\n  });\n\n  // Templates query (for apply template)\n  const templatesQuery = useQuery({\n    queryKey: dnsTemplateKeys.list(),\n    queryFn: listTemplates,\n  });\n\n  // Mutations\n  const createMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (body: { name: string; type: DNSRecordType; content: string; ttl?: number; priority?: number; disabled?: boolean }) =>\n      createRecord(id, body),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: dnsZoneKeys.records(id) });\n      closeModals();\n    },\n  });\n\n  const updateMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (body: { name: string; type: DNSRecordType; content: string; ttl?: number; priority?: number; disabled?: boolean }) =>\n      updateRecord(id, editModal!.id, body),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: dnsZoneKeys.records(id) });\n      closeModals();\n    },\n  });\n\n  const deleteMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: () => deleteRecord(id, deleteModal!.id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: dnsZoneKeys.records(id) });\n      setDeleteModal(null);\n    },\n  });\n\n  const applyTemplateMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (templateId: string) => applyTemplate(templateId, { zone_id: id }),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: dnsZoneKeys.records(id) });\n      setApplyTemplateModal(false);\n    },\n  });\n\n  const deleteZoneMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: () => deleteZone(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: dnsZoneKeys.all() });\n      navigate({ to: \"/dns/zones\" });\n    },\n  });\n\n  const records = recordsQuery.data?.records ?? [];\n\n  // Filter records\n  const filteredRecords = useMemo(() => {\n    let result = records;\n\n    if (searchQuery) {\n      const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n      result = result.filter(\n        (r) =>\n          r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||\n          r.content.toLowerCase().includes(query)\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (typeFilter !== \"all\") {\n      result = result.filter((r) => r.type === typeFilter);\n    }\n\n    return result;\n  }, [records, searchQuery, typeFilter]);\n\n  // Pagination\n  const totalPages = Math.ceil(filteredRecords.length / PAGE_SIZE);\n  const paginatedRecords = useMemo(() => {\n    const start = (currentPage - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    return filteredRecords.slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE);\n  }, [filteredRecords, currentPage]);\n\n  // Reset page when filters change\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setCurrentPage(1);\n  };\n\n  // Modal helpers\n  const openEditModal = (record: DNSRecord) => {\n    setEditModal(record);\n    setFormName(record.name);\n    setFormType(record.type);\n    setFormContent(record.content);\n    setFormTTL(String(record.ttl));\n    setFormPriority(String(record.priority));\n    setFormDisabled(record.disabled);\n  };\n\n  const closeModals = () => {\n    setCreateModalOpen(false);\n    setEditModal(null);\n    setFormName(\"\");\n    setFormType(\"A\");\n    setFormContent(\"\");\n    setFormTTL(\"3600\");\n    setFormPriority(\"0\");\n    setFormDisabled(false);\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = () => {\n    const body = {\n      name: formName,\n      type: formType,\n      content: formContent,\n      ttl: formTTL ? parseInt(formTTL, 10) : undefined,\n      priority: formPriority ? parseInt(formPriority, 10) : undefined,\n      disabled: formDisabled,\n    };\n\n    if (editModal) {\n      updateMutation.mutate(body);\n    } else {\n      createMutation.mutate(body);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isSubmitting = createMutation.isPending || updateMutation.isPending;\n\n  if (zoneQuery.isLoading) return <LoadingState />;\n  if (zoneQuery.isError || !zoneQuery.data) {\n    return <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load zone\" onRetry={() => zoneQuery.refetch()} />;\n  }\n\n  const zone = zoneQuery.data;\n\n  // Table columns\n  const columns: Column<DNSRecord>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"name\",\n      header: \"Name\",\n      cell: (r) => (\n        <span className={`font-mono text-sm ${r.disabled ? \"line-through text-gray-400\" : \"\"}`}>\n          {r.name || \"@\"}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"type\",\n      header: \"Type\",\n      cell: (r) => (\n        <span className=\"inline-flex items-center rounded bg-surface-2 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-ink-2\">\n          {r.type}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"content\",\n      header: \"Content\",\n      cell: (r) => (\n        <span className={`font-mono text-sm ${r.disabled ? \"line-through text-gray-400\" : \"\"}`}>\n          {r.content}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"ttl\",\n      header: \"TTL\",\n      cell: (r) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs text-gray-500\">{r.ttl}s</span>,\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"priority\",\n      header: \"Priority\",\n      cell: (r) => <span className=\"font-mono text-xs text-gray-500\">{r.priority || \"—\"}</span>,\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"disabled\",\n      header: \"Status\",\n      cell: (r) =>\n        r.disabled ? (\n          <StatusPill tone=\"warning\">Disabled</StatusPill>\n        ) : (\n          <StatusPill tone=\"success\">Active</StatusPill>\n        ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"actions\",\n      header: \"Actions\",\n      cell: (r) => (\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n          <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" onClick={() => openEditModal(r)}>\n            Edit\n          </Button>\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            className=\"text-red-600 hover:text-red-800 dark:text-red-400\"\n            onClick={() => setDeleteModal(r)}\n          >\n            Delete\n          </Button>\n        </div>\n      ),\n    },\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title={\n          <span className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n            <span>{zone.domain}</span>\n            <StatusPill\n              tone={\n                zone.status === \"active\"\n                  ? \"success\"\n                  : zone.status === \"suspended\"\n                  ? \"warning\"\n                  : \"neutral\"\n              }\n            >\n              {zone.status}\n            </StatusPill>\n          </span>\n        }\n        description={\n          <span>\n            <Link to=\"/dns/zones\" className=\"text-brand-600 hover:underline\">\n              DNS Zones\n            </Link>\n            <span className=\"mx-1.5 text-ink-4\">/</span>\n            <span className=\"font-mono text-xs\">{zone.id}</span>\n          </span>\n        }\n        actions={\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <Button variant=\"secondary\" onClick={() => setApplyTemplateModal(true)}>\n              Apply Template\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant=\"danger\"\n              loading={deleteZoneMutation.isPending}\n              onClick={() => {\n                if (window.confirm(`Delete zone \"${zone.domain}\"? This will remove all records.`)) {\n                  deleteZoneMutation.mutate();\n                }\n              }}\n            >\n              Delete Zone\n            </Button>\n          </div>\n        }\n      />\n\n      <Tabs\n        active={tab}\n        onChange={setTab}\n        tabs={[\n          {\n            key: \"records\",\n            label: `Records (${records.length})`,\n            panel: (\n              <RecordsTab\n                columns={columns}\n                paginatedRecords={paginatedRecords}\n                filteredRecords={filteredRecords}\n                searchQuery={searchQuery}\n                typeFilter={typeFilter}\n                currentPage={currentPage}\n                totalPages={totalPages}\n                onSearchChange={handleSearchChange}\n                onTypeFilterChange={(v) => {\n                  setTypeFilter(v);\n                  setCurrentPage(1);\n                }}\n                onPageChange={setCurrentPage}\n                onAddRecord={() => setCreateModalOpen(true)}\n              />\n            ),\n          },\n          {\n            key: \"settings\",\n            label: \"Settings\",\n            panel: <ZoneSettingsTab zone={zone} />,\n          },\n        ]}\n      />\n\n      {/* Create Record Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={createModalOpen}\n        onClose={closeModals}\n        title=\"Add DNS Record\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={closeModals}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              onClick={handleSubmit}\n              disabled={!formName.trim() || !formContent.trim() || isSubmitting}\n            >\n              {isSubmitting ? \"Adding...\" : \"Add Record\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <RecordForm\n          name={formName}\n          type={formType}\n          content={formContent}\n          ttl={formTTL}\n          priority={formPriority}\n          disabled={formDisabled}\n          onNameChange={setFormName}\n          onTypeChange={(v) => setFormType(v as DNSRecordType)}\n          onContentChange={setFormContent}\n          onTTLChange={setFormTTL}\n          onPriorityChange={setFormPriority}\n          onDisabledChange={setFormDisabled}\n          error={createMutation.isError ? \"Failed to create record\" : undefined}\n        />\n      </Modal>\n\n      {/* Edit Record Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={editModal !== null}\n        onClose={closeModals}\n        title=\"Edit DNS Record\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={closeModals}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              onClick={handleSubmit}\n              disabled={!formName.trim() || !formContent.trim() || isSubmitting}\n            >\n              {isSubmitting ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save Changes\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <RecordForm\n          name={formName}\n          type={formType}\n          content={formContent}\n          ttl={formTTL}\n          priority={formPriority}\n          disabled={formDisabled}\n          onNameChange={setFormName}\n          onTypeChange={(v) => setFormType(v as DNSRecordType)}\n          onContentChange={setFormContent}\n          onTTLChange={setFormTTL}\n          onPriorityChange={setFormPriority}\n          onDisabledChange={setFormDisabled}\n          error={updateMutation.isError ? \"Failed to update record\" : undefined}\n        />\n      </Modal>\n\n      {/* Delete Confirmation Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={deleteModal !== null}\n        onClose={() => setDeleteModal(null)}\n        title=\"Delete DNS Record\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setDeleteModal(null)}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant=\"danger\"\n              loading={deleteMutation.isPending}\n              onClick={() => deleteMutation.mutate()}\n            >\n              {deleteMutation.isPending ? \"Deleting...\" : \"Delete\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <p>\n          Are you sure you want to delete the record{\" \"}\n          <strong>\n            {deleteModal?.name || \"@\"} {deleteModal?.type}\n          </strong>\n          ? This action cannot be undone.\n        </p>\n      </Modal>\n\n      {/* Apply Template Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={applyTemplateModal}\n        onClose={() => setApplyTemplateModal(false)}\n        title=\"Apply Template\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setApplyTemplateModal(false)}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <ApplyTemplateForm\n          templates={templatesQuery.data?.templates ?? []}\n          isLoading={templatesQuery.isLoading}\n          onApply={(templateId) => applyTemplateMutation.mutate(templateId)}\n          isApplying={applyTemplateMutation.isPending}\n        />\n      </Modal>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// Records tab component\nfunction RecordsTab({\n  columns,\n  paginatedRecords,\n  filteredRecords,\n  searchQuery,\n  typeFilter,\n  currentPage,\n  totalPages,\n  onSearchChange,\n  onTypeFilterChange,\n  onPageChange,\n  onAddRecord,\n}: {\n  columns: Column<DNSRecord>[];\n  paginatedRecords: DNSRecord[];\n  filteredRecords: DNSRecord[];\n  searchQuery: string;\n  typeFilter: string;\n  currentPage: number;\n  totalPages: number;\n  onSearchChange: (value: string) => void;\n  onTypeFilterChange: (value: string) => void;\n  onPageChange: (page: number) => void;\n  onAddRecord: () => void;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n      {/* Filters */}\n      <Card className=\"p-4\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-[200px]\">\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Search records...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => onSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n          <Select\n            value={typeFilter}\n            onChange={(e) => onTypeFilterChange(e.target.value)}\n            className=\"w-32\"\n          >\n            <option value=\"all\">All Types</option>\n            {RECORD_TYPES.map((t) => (\n              <option key={t} value={t}>{t}</option>\n            ))}\n          </Select>\n          <Button onClick={onAddRecord}>Add Record</Button>\n        </div>\n      </Card>\n\n      {/* Table */}\n      {paginatedRecords.length === 0 ? (\n        <EmptyState\n          title=\"No records found\"\n          description={\n            searchQuery || typeFilter !== \"all\"\n              ? \"Try adjusting your filters\"\n              : \"Add your first DNS record to get started\"\n          }\n          action={!searchQuery && typeFilter === \"all\" ? <Button onClick={onAddRecord}>Add Record</Button> : undefined}\n        />\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <Table<DNSRecord> rows={paginatedRecords} columns={columns} keyOf={(r) => r.id} />\n          {totalPages > 1 && (\n            <div className=\"flex justify-center gap-2\">\n              <Button\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                size=\"sm\"\n                disabled={currentPage === 1}\n                onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage - 1)}\n              >\n                Previous\n              </Button>\n              <span className=\"px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">\n                Page {currentPage} of {totalPages} ({filteredRecords.length} total)\n              </span>\n              <Button\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                size=\"sm\"\n                disabled={currentPage === totalPages}\n                onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage + 1)}\n              >\n                Next\n              </Button>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// Zone settings tab component\nfunction ZoneSettingsTab({ zone }: { zone: DNSZone }) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2\">\n      <Card>\n        <CardHeader title=\"Zone Information\" />\n        <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\">\n          <Field label=\"Domain\" value={zone.domain} />\n          <Field label=\"Type\" value={zone.type} />\n          <Field label=\"Status\" value={zone.status} />\n          <Field label=\"Created\" value={new Date(zone.created_at).toLocaleString()} />\n          <Field label=\"Updated\" value={new Date(zone.updated_at).toLocaleString()} />\n        </dl>\n      </Card>\n      <Card>\n        <CardHeader title=\"SOA Settings\" />\n        <dl className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm\">\n          <Field label=\"Refresh\" value={`${zone.soa_refresh}s`} />\n          <Field label=\"Retry\" value={`${zone.soa_retry}s`} />\n          <Field label=\"Expire\" value={`${zone.soa_expire}s`} />\n          <Field label=\"Minimum\" value={`${zone.soa_minimum}s`} />\n        </dl>\n      </Card>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// Field helper\nfunction Field({ label, value }: { label: string; value: string }) {\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <dt className=\"text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wider text-ink-3\">{label}</dt>\n      <dd className=\"mt-0.5 text-sm text-ink-1 break-all\">{value}</dd>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// Record form component\nfunction RecordForm({\n  name,\n  type,\n  content,\n  ttl,\n  priority,\n  disabled,\n  onNameChange,\n  onTypeChange,\n  onContentChange,\n  onTTLChange,\n  onPriorityChange,\n  onDisabledChange,\n  error,\n}: {\n  name: string;\n  type: DNSRecordType;\n  content: string;\n  ttl: string;\n  priority: string;\n  disabled: boolean;\n  onNameChange: (value: string) => void;\n  onTypeChange: (value: string) => void;\n  onContentChange: (value: string) => void;\n  onTTLChange: (value: string) => void;\n  onPriorityChange: (value: string) => void;\n  onDisabledChange: (value: boolean) => void;\n  error?: string;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-4\">\n        <Input\n          label=\"Name\"\n          placeholder=\"@ or www\"\n          value={name}\n          onChange={(e) => onNameChange(e.target.value)}\n          hint=\"Use @ for root domain\"\n        />\n        <Select\n          label=\"Type\"\n          value={type}\n          onChange={(e) => onTypeChange(e.target.value)}\n        >\n          {RECORD_TYPES.map((t) => (\n            <option key={t} value={t}>\n              {t}\n            </option>\n          ))}\n        </Select>\n      </div>\n      <Input\n        label=\"Content\"\n        placeholder={\n          type === \"A\"\n            ? \"192.0.2.1\"\n            : type === \"AAAA\"\n            ? \"2001:db8::1\"\n            : type === \"MX\"\n            ? \"10 mail.example.com\"\n            : type === \"CNAME\"\n            ? \"example.com\"\n            : type === \"TXT\"\n            ? \"v=spf1 mx ~all\"\n            : \"Enter value\"\n        }\n        value={content}\n        onChange={(e) => onContentChange(e.target.value)}\n      />\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-4\">\n        <Input\n          label=\"TTL\"\n          type=\"number\"\n          placeholder=\"3600\"\n          value={ttl}\n          onChange={(e) => onTTLChange(e.target.value)}\n          hint=\"Time to live in seconds\"\n        />\n        <Input\n          label=\"Priority\"\n          type=\"number\"\n          placeholder=\"0\"\n          value={priority}\n          onChange={(e) => onPriorityChange(e.target.value)}\n          hint=\"For MX, SRV records\"\n        />\n      </div>\n      <label className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm\">\n        <input\n          type=\"checkbox\"\n          checked={disabled}\n          onChange={(e) => onDisabledChange(e.target.checked)}\n          className=\"rounded border-surface-border\"\n        />\n        <span>Disabled</span>\n      </label>\n      {error && <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">{error}</p>}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// Apply template form component\nfunction ApplyTemplateForm({\n  templates,\n  isLoading,\n  onApply,\n  isApplying,\n}: {\n  templates: { id: string; name: string; description?: string }[];\n  isLoading: boolean;\n  onApply: (templateId: string) => void;\n  isApplying: boolean;\n}) {\n  const [selectedTemplate, setSelectedTemplate] = useState<string>(\"\");\n\n  if (isLoading) {\n    return <p className=\"text-sm text-gray-500\">Loading templates...</p>;\n  }\n\n  if (templates.length === 0) {\n    return (\n      <div>\n        <p className=\"text-sm text-gray-500 mb-4\">No templates available.</p>\n        <Link to=\"/dns/templates\" className=\"text-brand-600 hover:underline text-sm\">\n          Create a template first\n        </Link>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n      <Select\n        label=\"Select Template\"\n        value={selectedTemplate}\n        onChange={(e) => setSelectedTemplate(e.target.value)}\n      >\n        <option value=\"\">Choose a template...</option>\n        {templates.map((t) => (\n          <option key={t.id} value={t.id}>\n            {t.name}\n          </option>\n        ))}\n      </Select>\n      {selectedTemplate && (\n        <div className=\"rounded-md bg-surface-2 p-3\">\n          <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">\n            {templates.find((t) => t.id === selectedTemplate)?.description || \"No description\"}\n          </p>\n        </div>\n      )}\n      <Button\n        onClick={() => selectedTemplate && onApply(selectedTemplate)}\n        disabled={!selectedTemplate || isApplying}\n        className=\"w-full\"\n      >\n        {isApplying ? \"Applying...\" : \"Apply Template\"}\n      </Button>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// Re-export types\nexport type { DNSZone, DNSRecord } from \"@/lib/api/dns\";","/**\n * DNS Templates page.\n *\n * Routes:\n *   /dns/zones                    ZonesListPage\n *   /dns/zones/:id                ZoneDetailPage\n *   /dns/templates                DNSTemplatesPage\n */\n\nimport { useState, useMemo } from \"react\";\nimport { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/lib/ui/Input\";\nimport { Modal } from \"@/lib/ui/Modal\";\nimport { Table, type Column } from \"@/lib/ui/Table\";\nimport { EmptyState, ErrorState, LoadingState } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport { dnsTemplateKeys } from \"@/lib/query/keys\";\nimport {\n  listTemplates,\n  createTemplate,\n  deleteTemplate,\n  type DNSZoneTemplate,\n  type TemplateRecordDefinition,\n} from \"@/lib/api/dns\";\n\nconst RECORD_TYPES = [\"A\", \"AAAA\", \"CNAME\", \"MX\", \"TXT\", \"NS\", \"SRV\", \"CAA\"];\n\ninterface TemplateRecordInput {\n  name: string;\n  type: string;\n  content: string;\n  ttl: string;\n  priority: string;\n}\n\nexport function DNSTemplatesPage() {\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n\n  // State\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [createModalOpen, setCreateModalOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [deleteModal, setDeleteModal] = useState<DNSZoneTemplate | null>(null);\n\n  // Form state\n  const [formName, setFormName] = useState(\"\");\n  const [formDescription, setFormDescription] = useState(\"\");\n  const [formRecords, setFormRecords] = useState<TemplateRecordInput[]>([\n    { name: \"\", type: \"A\", content: \"\", ttl: \"3600\", priority: \"0\" },\n  ]);\n\n  // Query\n  const q = useQuery({\n    queryKey: dnsTemplateKeys.list(),\n    queryFn: listTemplates,\n  });\n\n  // Mutations\n  const createMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (body: { name: string; description?: string; records: TemplateRecordDefinition[] }) =>\n      createTemplate(body),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: dnsTemplateKeys.all() });\n      closeCreateModal();\n    },\n  });\n\n  const deleteMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => deleteTemplate(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: dnsTemplateKeys.all() });\n      setDeleteModal(null);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Filter\n  const filteredTemplates = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!searchQuery) return q.data?.templates ?? [];\n    const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n    return (q.data?.templates ?? []).filter(\n      (t) =>\n        t.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||\n        (t.description && t.description.toLowerCase().includes(query))\n    );\n  }, [q.data?.templates, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Form helpers\n  const closeCreateModal = () => {\n    setCreateModalOpen(false);\n    setFormName(\"\");\n    setFormDescription(\"\");\n    setFormRecords([{ name: \"\", type: \"A\", content: \"\", ttl: \"3600\", priority: \"0\" }]);\n  };\n\n  const addRecord = () => {\n    setFormRecords([...formRecords, { name: \"\", type: \"A\", content: \"\", ttl: \"3600\", priority: \"0\" }]);\n  };\n\n  const removeRecord = (index: number) => {\n    setFormRecords(formRecords.filter((_, i) => i !== index));\n  };\n\n  const updateRecord = (index: number, field: keyof TemplateRecordInput, value: string) => {\n    const updated = [...formRecords];\n    updated[index] = { ...updated[index], [field]: value };\n    setFormRecords(updated);\n  };\n\n  const handleCreate = () => {\n    const records: TemplateRecordDefinition[] = formRecords\n      .filter((r) => r.name.trim() && r.content.trim())\n      .map((r) => ({\n        name: r.name,\n        type: r.type as TemplateRecordDefinition[\"type\"],\n        content: r.content,\n        ttl: r.ttl ? parseInt(r.ttl, 10) : undefined,\n        priority: r.priority ? parseInt(r.priority, 10) : undefined,\n      }));\n\n    createMutation.mutate({\n      name: formName.trim(),\n      description: formDescription.trim() || undefined,\n      records,\n    });\n  };\n\n  // Table columns\n  const columns: Column<DNSZoneTemplate>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"name\",\n      header: \"Name\",\n      cell: (t) => <span className=\"font-medium text-ink-1\">{t.name}</span>,\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"description\",\n      header: \"Description\",\n      cell: (t) => (\n        <span className=\"text-gray-500\">{t.description || \"—\"}</span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"records_count\",\n      header: \"Records\",\n      cell: (t) => {\n        try {\n          const records = JSON.parse(t.records);\n          return <span className=\"text-gray-500\">{records.length} record(s)</span>;\n        } catch {\n          return <span className=\"text-gray-400\">—</span>;\n        }\n      },\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"created_at\",\n      header: \"Created\",\n      cell: (t) => new Date(t.created_at).toLocaleDateString(),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"actions\",\n      header: \"Actions\",\n      cell: (t) => (\n        <Button\n          variant=\"ghost\"\n          size=\"sm\"\n          className=\"text-red-600 hover:text-red-800 dark:text-red-400\"\n          onClick={() => setDeleteModal(t)}\n        >\n          Delete\n        </Button>\n      ),\n    },\n  ];\n\n  if (q.isLoading) return <LoadingState />;\n  if (q.isError) return <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load templates\" onRetry={() => q.refetch()} />;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"DNS Templates\"\n        description=\"Reusable DNS record templates for quick zone setup\"\n        actions={\n          <Button onClick={() => setCreateModalOpen(true)}>Create Template</Button>\n        }\n      />\n\n      {/* Search */}\n      {filteredTemplates.length > 0 && (\n        <Card className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"max-w-sm\">\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Search templates...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n        </Card>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Table */}\n      {filteredTemplates.length === 0 ? (\n        <EmptyState\n          title=\"No templates found\"\n          description={\n            searchQuery\n              ? \"Try adjusting your search\"\n              : \"Create your first DNS template to speed up zone setup\"\n          }\n          action={\n            !searchQuery ? (\n              <Button onClick={() => setCreateModalOpen(true)}>Create Template</Button>\n            ) : undefined\n          }\n        />\n      ) : (\n        <Table<DNSZoneTemplate> rows={filteredTemplates} columns={columns} keyOf={(t) => t.id} />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Create Template Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={createModalOpen}\n        onClose={closeCreateModal}\n        title=\"Create DNS Template\"\n        width=\"lg\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={closeCreateModal}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              onClick={handleCreate}\n              disabled={!formName.trim() || createMutation.isPending}\n            >\n              {createMutation.isPending ? \"Creating...\" : \"Create Template\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n          <Input\n            label=\"Template Name\"\n            placeholder=\"My Template\"\n            value={formName}\n            onChange={(e) => setFormName(e.target.value)}\n          />\n          <Input\n            label=\"Description (optional)\"\n            placeholder=\"Brief description of this template\"\n            value={formDescription}\n            onChange={(e) => setFormDescription(e.target.value)}\n          />\n\n          <div>\n            <div className=\"mb-2 flex items-center justify-between\">\n              <label className=\"text-xs font-medium text-ink-2\">Records</label>\n              <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"sm\" onClick={addRecord}>\n                + Add Record\n              </Button>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"space-y-3 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto\">\n              {formRecords.map((record, index) => (\n                <div key={index} className=\"grid grid-cols-12 gap-2 items-end p-3 bg-surface-2 rounded-md\">\n                  <div className=\"col-span-3\">\n                    <Input\n                      placeholder=\"Name\"\n                      value={record.name}\n                      onChange={(e) => updateRecord(index, \"name\", e.target.value)}\n                    />\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"col-span-2\">\n                    <select\n                      value={record.type}\n                      onChange={(e) => updateRecord(index, \"type\", e.target.value)}\n                      className=\"w-full rounded-md border border-surface-border bg-surface-1 px-2 py-1.5 text-sm\"\n                    >\n                      {RECORD_TYPES.map((t) => (\n                        <option key={t} value={t}>{t}</option>\n                      ))}\n                    </select>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"col-span-4\">\n                    <Input\n                      placeholder=\"Content\"\n                      value={record.content}\n                      onChange={(e) => updateRecord(index, \"content\", e.target.value)}\n                    />\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"col-span-2\">\n                    <Input\n                      placeholder=\"TTL\"\n                      value={record.ttl}\n                      onChange={(e) => updateRecord(index, \"ttl\", e.target.value)}\n                    />\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"col-span-1\">\n                    <Button\n                      variant=\"ghost\"\n                      size=\"sm\"\n                      className=\"text-red-500\"\n                      onClick={() => removeRecord(index)}\n                      disabled={formRecords.length === 1}\n                    >\n                      ×\n                    </Button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {createMutation.isError && (\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">\n              Failed to create template. Please check your input.\n            </p>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </Modal>\n\n      {/* Delete Confirmation Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={deleteModal !== null}\n        onClose={() => setDeleteModal(null)}\n        title=\"Delete Template\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setDeleteModal(null)}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant=\"danger\"\n              loading={deleteMutation.isPending}\n              onClick={() => deleteModal && deleteMutation.mutate(deleteModal.id)}\n            >\n              {deleteMutation.isPending ? \"Deleting...\" : \"Delete\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <p>\n          Are you sure you want to delete the template <strong>{deleteModal?.name}</strong>?\n          This action cannot be undone.\n        </p>\n      </Modal>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// Re-export types\nexport type { DNSZoneTemplate } from \"@/lib/api/dns\";","/**\n * SSL Certificates list. Real data from the backend API.\n *\n * Routes:\n *   /ssl/certificates              CertificatesListPage\n *   /ssl/certificates/:id          CertificateDetailPage\n */\n\nimport { useState, useMemo } from \"react\";\nimport { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Link } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/lib/ui/Input\";\nimport { Select } from \"@/lib/ui/Select\";\nimport { Modal } from \"@/lib/ui/Modal\";\nimport { Table, type Column } from \"@/lib/ui/Table\";\nimport { StatusPill } from \"@/lib/ui/StatusPill\";\nimport { EmptyState, ErrorState, LoadingState } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport {\n  sslKeys,\n  listCertificates,\n  issueCertificate,\n  importCertificate,\n  renewCertificate,\n  deleteCertificate,\n  type SSLCertificate,\n  type SSLCertStatus,\n  type IssueCertificateRequest,\n  type SSLProvider,\n} from \"@/lib/api/ssl\";\n\nconst PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n\nfunction getStatusTone(status: SSLCertStatus): \"success\" | \"warning\" | \"danger\" | \"neutral\" {\n  switch (status) {\n    case \"issued\":\n      return \"success\";\n    case \"expiring_soon\":\n      return \"warning\";\n    case \"expired\":\n    case \"failed\":\n    case \"revoked\":\n      return \"danger\";\n    default:\n      return \"neutral\";\n  }\n}\n\nfunction formatExpiry(dateStr?: string): string {\n  if (!dateStr) return \"—\";\n  const date = new Date(dateStr);\n  const now = new Date();\n  const diffDays = Math.ceil((date.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));\n  if (diffDays < 0) return `Expired ${Math.abs(diffDays)} days ago`;\n  if (diffDays === 0) return \"Expires today\";\n  if (diffDays <= 30) return `Expires in ${diffDays} days`;\n  return date.toLocaleDateString();\n}\n\nexport function CertificatesListPage() {\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n\n  // Filter and pagination state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<string>(\"all\");\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);\n\n  // Modal state\n  const [issueModalOpen, setIssueModalOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [importModalOpen, setImportModalOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [deleteModal, setDeleteModal] = useState<SSLCertificate | null>(null);\n  const [renewModal, setRenewModal] = useState<SSLCertificate | null>(null);\n\n  // Issue form state\n  const [newCertDomain, setNewCertDomain] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newCertSANs, setNewCertSANs] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newCertProvider, setNewCertProvider] = useState<SSLProvider>(\"letsencrypt\");\n  const [newCertAutoRenew, setNewCertAutoRenew] = useState(true);\n\n  // Import form state\n  const [importDomain, setImportDomain] = useState(\"\");\n  const [importCertPEM, setImportCertPEM] = useState(\"\");\n  const [importKeyPEM, setImportKeyPEM] = useState(\"\");\n  const [importChainPEM, setImportChainPEM] = useState(\"\");\n\n  // Fetch certificates\n  const q = useQuery({\n    queryKey: sslKeys.certificates(),\n    queryFn: listCertificates,\n  });\n\n  const certs = q.data ?? [];\n\n  // Issue mutation\n  const issueMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (body: IssueCertificateRequest) =>\n      issueCertificate(body),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: sslKeys.all });\n      setIssueModalOpen(false);\n      resetIssueForm();\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Import mutation\n  const importMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (body: { domain: string; cert_pem: string; key_pem: string; chain_pem?: string }) =>\n      importCertificate(body),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: sslKeys.all });\n      setImportModalOpen(false);\n      resetImportForm();\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Renew mutation\n  const renewMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => renewCertificate(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: sslKeys.all });\n      setRenewModal(null);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Delete mutation\n  const deleteMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => deleteCertificate(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: sslKeys.all });\n      setDeleteModal(null);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Filter certificates\n  const filteredCerts = useMemo(() => {\n    let result = certs;\n\n    if (searchQuery) {\n      const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n      result = result.filter(\n        (c) =>\n          c.common_name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||\n          (c.san_names && c.san_names.some((s) => s.toLowerCase().includes(query)))\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (statusFilter !== \"all\") {\n      result = result.filter((c) => c.status === statusFilter);\n    }\n\n    return result;\n  }, [certs, searchQuery, statusFilter]);\n\n  // Pagination\n  const totalPages = Math.ceil(filteredCerts.length / PAGE_SIZE);\n  const paginatedCerts = useMemo(() => {\n    const start = (currentPage - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    return filteredCerts.slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE);\n  }, [filteredCerts, currentPage]);\n\n  // Reset page when filters change\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setCurrentPage(1);\n  };\n\n  // Form handlers\n  const resetIssueForm = () => {\n    setNewCertDomain(\"\");\n    setNewCertSANs(\"\");\n    setNewCertProvider(\"letsencrypt\");\n    setNewCertAutoRenew(true);\n  };\n\n  const resetImportForm = () => {\n    setImportDomain(\"\");\n    setImportCertPEM(\"\");\n    setImportKeyPEM(\"\");\n    setImportChainPEM(\"\");\n  };\n\n  const handleIssueCert = () => {\n    if (!newCertDomain.trim()) return;\n    issueMutation.mutate({\n      domain: newCertDomain.trim(),\n      san_names: newCertSANs ? newCertSANs.split(\",\").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean) : undefined,\n      provider: newCertProvider,\n      auto_renew: newCertAutoRenew,\n    });\n  };\n\n  const handleImportCert = () => {\n    if (!importDomain.trim() || !importCertPEM.trim() || !importKeyPEM.trim()) return;\n    importMutation.mutate({\n      domain: importDomain.trim(),\n      cert_pem: importCertPEM.trim(),\n      key_pem: importKeyPEM.trim(),\n      chain_pem: importChainPEM.trim() || undefined,\n    });\n  };\n\n  // Table columns\n  const columns: Column<SSLCertificate>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"domain\",\n      header: \"Domain\",\n      cell: (cert) => (\n        <Link\n          to=\"/ssl/certificates/$id\"\n          params={{ id: cert.id }}\n          className=\"font-medium text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-400 dark:hover:text-blue-300\"\n        >\n          {cert.common_name}\n        </Link>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"provider\",\n      header: \"Provider\",\n      cell: (cert) => (\n        <span className=\"capitalize text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">{cert.provider}</span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"status\",\n      header: \"Status\",\n      cell: (cert) => (\n        <StatusPill tone={getStatusTone(cert.status)}>\n          {cert.status.replace(\"_\", \" \")}\n        </StatusPill>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"expires\",\n      header: \"Expires\",\n      cell: (cert) => (\n        <span className=\"text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">{formatExpiry(cert.not_after)}</span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"auto_renew\",\n      header: \"Auto-Renew\",\n      cell: (cert) => (\n        <span className={cert.auto_renew ? \"text-green-600\" : \"text-gray-400\"}>\n          {cert.auto_renew ? \"Yes\" : \"No\"}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"actions\",\n      header: \"Actions\",\n      cell: (cert) => (\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            onClick={() => setRenewModal(cert)}\n          >\n            Renew\n          </Button>\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            className=\"text-red-600 hover:text-red-800 dark:text-red-400\"\n            onClick={() => setDeleteModal(cert)}\n          >\n            Delete\n          </Button>\n        </div>\n      ),\n    },\n  ];\n\n  if (q.isLoading) return <LoadingState />;\n  if (q.isError) return <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load certificates\" onRetry={() => q.refetch()} />;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"SSL Certificates\"\n        description=\"Manage SSL/TLS certificates with Let's Encrypt and other providers\"\n        actions={\n          <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setImportModalOpen(true)}>\n              Import\n            </Button>\n            <Button onClick={() => setIssueModalOpen(true)}>Issue New</Button>\n          </div>\n        }\n      />\n\n      {/* Filters */}\n      <Card className=\"p-4\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-[200px]\">\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Search domains...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n          <Select\n            value={statusFilter}\n            onChange={(e) => {\n              setStatusFilter(e.target.value);\n              setCurrentPage(1);\n            }}\n            className=\"w-40\"\n          >\n            <option value=\"all\">All Status</option>\n            <option value=\"issued\">Active</option>\n            <option value=\"expiring_soon\">Expiring Soon</option>\n            <option value=\"expired\">Expired</option>\n            <option value=\"pending\">Pending</option>\n            <option value=\"failed\">Failed</option>\n            <option value=\"revoked\">Revoked</option>\n          </Select>\n        </div>\n      </Card>\n\n      {/* Table */}\n      {paginatedCerts.length === 0 ? (\n        <EmptyState\n          title=\"No certificates found\"\n          description={\n            searchQuery || statusFilter !== \"all\"\n              ? \"Try adjusting your filters\"\n              : \"Issue your first SSL certificate to get started\"\n          }\n          action={\n            !searchQuery && statusFilter === \"all\" ? (\n              <Button onClick={() => setIssueModalOpen(true)}>Issue Certificate</Button>\n            ) : undefined\n          }\n        />\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <Table<SSLCertificate> rows={paginatedCerts} columns={columns} keyOf={(c) => c.id} />\n          {totalPages > 1 && (\n            <div className=\"flex justify-center gap-2\">\n              <Button\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                size=\"sm\"\n                disabled={currentPage === 1}\n                onClick={() => setCurrentPage((p) => p - 1)}\n              >\n                Previous\n              </Button>\n              <span className=\"px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">\n                Page {currentPage} of {totalPages}\n              </span>\n              <Button\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                size=\"sm\"\n                disabled={currentPage === totalPages}\n                onClick={() => setCurrentPage((p) => p + 1)}\n              >\n                Next\n              </Button>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Issue Certificate Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={issueModalOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIssueModalOpen(false)}\n        title=\"Issue New Certificate\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setIssueModalOpen(false)}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              onClick={handleIssueCert}\n              disabled={!newCertDomain.trim() || issueMutation.isPending}\n            >\n              {issueMutation.isPending ? \"Issuing...\" : \"Issue\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">Domain *</label>\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"example.com\"\n              value={newCertDomain}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewCertDomain(e.target.value)}\n              onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === \"Enter\" && handleIssueCert()}\n            />\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">Additional Domains (SANs)</label>\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"www.example.com, api.example.com\"\n              value={newCertSANs}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewCertSANs(e.target.value)}\n            />\n            <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500\">Comma-separated list of additional domains</p>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">Provider</label>\n            <Select\n              value={newCertProvider}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewCertProvider(e.target.value as SSLProvider)}\n            >\n              <option value=\"letsencrypt\">Let's Encrypt</option>\n              <option value=\"zerossl\">ZeroSSL</option>\n            </Select>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <input\n              type=\"checkbox\"\n              id=\"auto-renew\"\n              checked={newCertAutoRenew}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewCertAutoRenew(e.target.checked)}\n              className=\"rounded border-gray-300\"\n            />\n            <label htmlFor=\"auto-renew\" className=\"text-sm\">Enable auto-renewal (recommended)</label>\n          </div>\n          {issueMutation.isError && (\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">\n              Failed to issue certificate. Please check the domain name and try again.\n            </p>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </Modal>\n\n      {/* Import Certificate Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={importModalOpen}\n        onClose={() => setImportModalOpen(false)}\n        title=\"Import Certificate\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() =>
