const units = [\"B\", \"KB\", \"MB\", \"GB\"];\n  let i = 0;\n  let size = bytes;\n  while (size >= 1024 && i < units.length - 1) {\n    size /= 1024;\n    i++;\n  }\n  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[i]}`;\n}\n\nfunction formatDate(dateStr?: string): string {\n  if (!dateStr) return \"—\";\n  return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString();\n}\n\nexport function BackupsListPage() {\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n\n  // Filter and pagination state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<string>(\"all\");\n  const [typeFilter, setTypeFilter] = useState<string>(\"all\");\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);\n\n  // Modal state\n  const [createModalOpen, setCreateModalOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [deleteModal, setDeleteModal] = useState<BackupJob | null>(null);\n\n  // Create form state\n  const [newBackupType, setNewBackupType] = useState<BackupType>(\"files\");\n  const [newBackupName, setNewBackupName] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newBackupDomainID, setNewBackupDomainID] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newBackupRetention, setNewBackupRetention] = useState(30);\n\n  // Fetch backups\n  const q = useQuery({\n    queryKey: backupKeys.list({ page: String(currentPage), status: statusFilter, type: typeFilter }),\n    queryFn: () =>\n      listBackups({\n        page: currentPage,\n        page_size: PAGE_SIZE,\n        status: statusFilter === \"all\" ? undefined : statusFilter,\n        type: typeFilter === \"all\" ? undefined : typeFilter,\n      }),\n  });\n\n  // Fetch stats\n  const statsQ = useQuery({\n    queryKey: backupKeys.stats(),\n    queryFn: getBackupStats,\n  });\n\n  const backups = q.data?.backups ?? [];\n  const totalPages = q.data?.total_pages ?? 1;\n\n  // Create mutation\n  const createMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (data: CreateBackupRequest) => createBackup(data),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: backupKeys.all });\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: backupKeys.stats() });\n      setCreateModalOpen(false);\n      resetCreateForm();\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Delete mutation\n  const deleteMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => deleteBackup(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: backupKeys.all });\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: backupKeys.stats() });\n      setDeleteModal(null);\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Filter backups\n  const filteredBackups = useMemo(() => {\n    if (!searchQuery) return backups;\n    const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n    return backups.filter(\n      (b) =>\n        b.name?.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||\n        b.id.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||\n        b.storage_path?.toLowerCase().includes(query)\n    );\n  }, [backups, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Reset page when filters change\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setCurrentPage(1);\n  };\n\n  // Form handlers\n  const resetCreateForm = () => {\n    setNewBackupType(\"files\");\n    setNewBackupName(\"\");\n    setNewBackupDomainID(\"\");\n    setNewBackupRetention(30);\n  };\n\n  const handleCreateBackup = () => {\n    createMutation.mutate({\n      type: newBackupType,\n      name: newBackupName || undefined,\n      domain_id: newBackupDomainID || undefined,\n      retention_days: newBackupRetention,\n    });\n  };\n\n  // Table columns\n  const columns: Column<BackupJob>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"name\",\n      header: \"Name\",\n      cell: (backup) => (\n        <div>\n          <div className=\"font-medium\">{backup.name || \"Unnamed Backup\"}</div>\n          <div className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">{backup.id}</div>\n        </div>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"type\",\n      header: \"Type\",\n      cell: (backup) => (\n        <span className=\"capitalize text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">\n          {backup.type}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"status\",\n      header: \"Status\",\n      cell: (backup) => (\n        <StatusPill tone={getStatusTone(backup.status)}>\n          {backup.status.replace(\"_\", \" \")}\n        </StatusPill>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"size\",\n      header: \"Size\",\n      cell: (backup) => (\n        <span className=\"text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">\n          {formatBytes(backup.file_size)}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"files\",\n      header: \"Files\",\n      cell: (backup) => (\n        <span className=\"text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">\n          {backup.file_count.toLocaleString()}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"created\",\n      header: \"Created\",\n      cell: (backup) => (\n        <span className=\"text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">\n          {formatDate(backup.created_at)}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"actions\",\n      header: \"Actions\",\n      cell: (backup) => (\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n          <Link\n            to=\"/backup/$id\"\n            params={{ id: backup.id }}\n            className=\"text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-400 dark:hover:text-blue-300 text-sm\"\n          >\n            Details\n          </Link>\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            className=\"text-red-600 hover:text-red-800 dark:text-red-400\"\n            onClick={() => setDeleteModal(backup)}\n          >\n            Delete\n          </Button>\n        </div>\n      ),\n    },\n  ];\n\n  if (q.isLoading) return <LoadingState />;\n  if (q.isError) return <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load backups\" onRetry={() => q.refetch()} />;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title=\"Backups\"\n        description=\"Manage automated and manual backups with restore capability\"\n        actions={\n          <Button onClick={() => setCreateModalOpen(true)}>Create Backup</Button>\n        }\n      />\n\n      {/* Stats Cards */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4\">\n        <Card className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"text-sm text-gray-500\">Total Backups</div>\n          <div className=\"text-2xl font-bold\">\n            {statsQ.isLoading ? \"—\" : statsQ.data?.total_backups ?? 0}\n          </div>\n        </Card>\n        <Card className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"text-sm text-gray-500\">Active</div>\n          <div className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-green-600\">\n            {statsQ.isLoading ? \"—\" : statsQ.data?.active_backups ?? 0}\n          </div>\n        </Card>\n        <Card className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"text-sm text-gray-500\">Failed</div>\n          <div className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-red-600\">\n            {statsQ.isLoading ? \"—\" : statsQ.data?.failed_backups ?? 0}\n          </div>\n        </Card>\n        <Card className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"text-sm text-gray-500\">Storage Used</div>\n          <div className=\"text-2xl font-bold\">\n            {statsQ.isLoading ? \"—\" : `${statsQ.data?.total_storage_mb ?? 0} MB`}\n          </div>\n        </Card>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Filters */}\n      <Card className=\"p-4\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-4\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-[200px]\">\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Search backups...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n          <Select\n            value={statusFilter}\n            onChange={(e) => {\n              setStatusFilter(e.target.value);\n              setCurrentPage(1);\n            }}\n            className=\"w-40\"\n          >\n            <option value=\"all\">All Status</option>\n            <option value=\"pending\">Pending</option>\n            <option value=\"running\">Running</option>\n            <option value=\"completed\">Completed</option>\n            <option value=\"failed\">Failed</option>\n          </Select>\n          <Select\n            value={typeFilter}\n            onChange={(e) => {\n              setTypeFilter(e.target.value);\n              setCurrentPage(1);\n            }}\n            className=\"w-40\"\n          >\n            <option value=\"all\">All Types</option>\n            <option value=\"full\">Full</option>\n            <option value=\"files\">Files</option>\n            <option value=\"database\">Database</option>\n          </Select>\n        </div>\n      </Card>\n\n      {/* Table */}\n      {filteredBackups.length === 0 ? (\n        <EmptyState\n          title=\"No backups found\"\n          description={\n            searchQuery || statusFilter !== \"all\" || typeFilter !== \"all\"\n              ? \"Try adjusting your filters\"\n              : \"Create your first backup to get started\"\n          }\n          action={\n            !searchQuery && statusFilter === \"all\" && typeFilter === \"all\" ? (\n              <Button onClick={() => setCreateModalOpen(true)}>Create Backup</Button>\n            ) : undefined\n          }\n        />\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <Table<BackupJob> rows={filteredBackups} columns={columns} keyOf={(b) => b.id} />\n          {totalPages > 1 && (\n            <div className=\"flex justify-center gap-2\">\n              <Button\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                size=\"sm\"\n                disabled={currentPage === 1}\n                onClick={() => setCurrentPage((p) => p - 1)}\n              >\n                Previous\n              </Button>\n              <span className=\"px-3 py-2 text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">\n                Page {currentPage} of {totalPages}\n              </span>\n              <Button\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                size=\"sm\"\n                disabled={currentPage === totalPages}\n                onClick={() => setCurrentPage((p) => p + 1)}\n              >\n                Next\n              </Button>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Create Backup Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={createModalOpen}\n        onClose={() => setCreateModalOpen(false)}\n        title=\"Create Backup\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setCreateModalOpen(false)}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              onClick={handleCreateBackup}\n              disabled={createMutation.isPending}\n            >\n              {createMutation.isPending ? \"Creating...\" : \"Create\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">Backup Type *</label>\n            <Select\n              value={newBackupType}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewBackupType(e.target.value as BackupType)}\n            >\n              <option value=\"files\">Files Only</option>\n              <option value=\"database\">Database Only</option>\n              <option value=\"full\">Full Backup</option>\n            </Select>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">Name (Optional)</label>\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"My Backup\"\n              value={newBackupName}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewBackupName(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">Domain ID (Optional)</label>\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Domain to backup\"\n              value={newBackupDomainID}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewBackupDomainID(e.target.value)}\n            />\n            <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500\">Leave empty to backup all accessible data</p>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">Retention Days</label>\n            <Input\n              type=\"number\"\n              min={1}\n              max={365}\n              value={newBackupRetention}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewBackupRetention(parseInt(e.target.value) || 30)}\n            />\n            <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500\">Backup will be automatically deleted after this period</p>\n          </div>\n          {createMutation.isError && (\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">\n              Failed to create backup. Please try again.\n            </p>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </Modal>\n\n      {/* Delete Confirmation Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={deleteModal !== null}\n        onClose={() => setDeleteModal(null)}\n        title=\"Delete Backup\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setDeleteModal(null)}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant=\"danger\"\n              onClick={() => deleteModal && deleteMutation.mutate(deleteModal.id)}\n              loading={deleteMutation.isPending}\n            >\n              {deleteMutation.isPending ? \"Deleting...\" : \"Delete\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <p>\n          Are you sure you want to delete backup <strong>{deleteModal?.name || deleteModal?.id}</strong>?\n          This action cannot be undone.\n        </p>\n      </Modal>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// Re-export types\nexport type { BackupJob, BackupStatus, BackupType } from \"@/lib/api/backup\";","/**\n * Backup detail page with restore functionality.\n */\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useNavigate } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { PageHeader } from \"@/lib/ui/PageHeader\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/lib/ui/Input\";\nimport { Modal } from \"@/lib/ui/Modal\";\nimport { Table, type Column } from \"@/lib/ui/Table\";\nimport { StatusPill } from \"@/lib/ui/StatusPill\";\nimport { EmptyState, ErrorState, LoadingState } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport {\n  backupKeys,\n  getBackup,\n  getBackupFiles,\n  getRestorePoints,\n  restoreBackup,\n  deleteBackup,\n  type BackupFile,\n  type RestorePoint,\n  type RestoreBackupRequest,\n} from \"@/lib/api/backup\";\n\nfunction formatBytes(bytes: number): string {\n  if (bytes === 0) return \"—\";\n  const units = [\"B\", \"KB\", \"MB\", \"GB\"];\n  let i = 0;\n  let size = bytes;\n  while (size >= 1024 && i < units.length - 1) {\n    size /= 1024;\n    i++;\n  }\n  return `${size.toFixed(1)} ${units[i]}`;\n}\n\nfunction formatDate(dateStr?: string): string {\n  if (!dateStr) return \"—\";\n  return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleString();\n}\n\nfunction getStatusTone(status: string): \"success\" | \"warning\" | \"danger\" | \"neutral\" {\n  switch (status) {\n    case \"completed\":\n      return \"success\";\n    case \"running\":\n      return \"neutral\";\n    case \"pending\":\n      return \"neutral\";\n    case \"failed\":\n      return \"danger\";\n    default:\n      return \"neutral\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function BackupDetailPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams({ strict: false }) as { id: string };\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n  const qc = useQueryClient();\n\n  // Modal state\n  const [restoreModalOpen, setRestoreModalOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [deleteModalOpen, setDeleteModalOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // Restore form state\n  const [restoreTargetDir, setRestoreTargetDir] = useState(\"\");\n  const [rollbackEnabled, setRollbackEnabled] = useState(true);\n\n  // Fetch backup\n  const backupQ = useQuery({\n    queryKey: backupKeys.detail(id),\n    queryFn: () => getBackup(id),\n  });\n\n  // Fetch files\n  const filesQ = useQuery({\n    queryKey: backupKeys.files(id),\n    queryFn: () => getBackupFiles(id),\n  });\n\n  // Fetch restore points\n  const restoresQ = useQuery({\n    queryKey: backupKeys.restores(id),\n    queryFn: () => getRestorePoints(id),\n  });\n\n  // Restore mutation\n  const restoreMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (data: RestoreBackupRequest) => restoreBackup(id, data),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      qc.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: backupKeys.restores(id) });\n      setRestoreModalOpen(false);\n      resetRestoreForm();\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Delete mutation\n  const deleteMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: () => deleteBackup(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      navigate({ to: \"/backup\" });\n    },\n  });\n\n  const backup = backupQ.data;\n  const files = filesQ.data?.files ?? [];\n  const restorePoints = restoresQ.data?.restore_points ?? [];\n\n  // Form handlers\n  const resetRestoreForm = () => {\n    setRestoreTargetDir(\"\");\n    setRollbackEnabled(true);\n  };\n\n  const handleRestore = () => {\n    if (!restoreTargetDir.trim()) return;\n    restoreMutation.mutate({\n      target_dir: restoreTargetDir.trim(),\n      rollback_enabled: rollbackEnabled,\n    });\n  };\n\n  // File table columns\n  const fileColumns: Column<BackupFile>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"original_path\",\n      header: \"Original Path\",\n      cell: (file) => (\n        <span className=\"font-mono text-sm truncate max-w-[300px] block\" title={file.original_path}>\n          {file.original_path}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"size\",\n      header: \"Size\",\n      cell: (file) => (\n        <span className=\"text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">{formatBytes(file.size)}</span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"checksum\",\n      header: \"Checksum\",\n      cell: (file) => (\n        <span className=\"font-mono text-xs text-gray-500 truncate max-w-[150px] block\" title={file.checksum}>\n          {file.checksum.substring(0, 16)}...\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n  ];\n\n  // Restore point columns\n  const restoreColumns: Column<RestorePoint>[] = [\n    {\n      key: \"id\",\n      header: \"ID\",\n      cell: (rp) => (\n        <span className=\"font-mono text-sm\">{rp.id.substring(0, 16)}...</span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"status\",\n      header: \"Status\",\n      cell: (rp) => (\n        <StatusPill tone={getStatusTone(rp.status)}>\n          {rp.status.replace(\"_\", \" \")}\n        </StatusPill>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"files_restored\",\n      header: \"Files\",\n      cell: (rp) => <span>{rp.files_restored}</span>,\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"bytes_restored\",\n      header: \"Size\",\n      cell: (rp) => <span>{formatBytes(rp.bytes_restored)}</span>,\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"rollback\",\n      header: \"Rollback\",\n      cell: (rp) => (\n        <span className={rp.rollback_used ? \"text-red-600\" : \"text-gray-400\"}>\n          {rp.rollback_used ? \"Used\" : \"Not used\"}\n        </span>\n      ),\n    },\n    {\n      key: \"created\",\n      header: \"Created\",\n      cell: (rp) => <span className=\"text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400\">{formatDate(rp.created_at)}</span>,\n    },\n  ];\n\n  if (backupQ.isLoading) return <LoadingState />;\n  if (backupQ.isError) return <ErrorState description=\"Failed to load backup\" onRetry={() => backupQ.refetch()} />;\n  if (!backup) return <ErrorState description=\"Backup not found\" />;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      <PageHeader\n        title={backup.name || \"Backup Details\"}\n        description={`Backup ID: ${backup.id}`}\n        actions={\n          <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setRestoreModalOpen(true)}>\n              Restore\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant=\"danger\"\n              onClick={() => setDeleteModalOpen(true)}\n            >\n              Delete\n            </Button>\n          </div>\n        }\n      />\n\n      {/* Backup Info */}\n      <div className=\"grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2\">\n        <Card className=\"p-4\">\n          <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold mb-4\">Backup Information</h3>\n          <dl className=\"space-y-3\">\n            <div className=\"flex justify-between\">\n              <dt className=\"text-gray-500\">Status</dt>\n              <dd>\n                <StatusPill tone={getStatusTone(backup.status)}>\n                  {backup.status.replace(\"_\", \" \")}\n                </StatusPill>\n              </dd>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"flex justify-between\">\n              <dt className=\"text-gray-500\">Type</dt>\n              <dd className=\"capitalize\">{backup.type}</dd>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"flex justify-between\">\n              <dt className=\"text-gray-500\">Storage Backend</dt>\n              <dd>{backup.storage_backend}</dd>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"flex justify-between\">\n              <dt className=\"text-gray-500\">Retention</dt>\n              <dd>{backup.retention_days} days</dd>\n            </div>\n            {backup.checksum && (\n              <div className=\"flex justify-between\">\n                <dt className=\"text-gray-500\">Checksum</dt>\n                <dd className=\"font-mono text-xs truncate max-w-[200px]\" title={backup.checksum}>\n                  {backup.checksum.substring(0, 32)}...\n                </dd>\n              </div>\n            )}\n          </dl>\n        </Card>\n\n        <Card className=\"p-4\">\n          <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold mb-4\">File Statistics</h3>\n          <dl className=\"space-y-3\">\n            <div className=\"flex justify-between\">\n              <dt className=\"text-gray-500\">Total Files</dt>\n              <dd className=\"font-semibold\">{backup.file_count.toLocaleString()}</dd>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"flex justify-between\">\n              <dt className=\"text-gray-500\">Total Size</dt>\n              <dd className=\"font-semibold\">{formatBytes(backup.file_size)}</dd>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"flex justify-between\">\n              <dt className=\"text-gray-500\">Created</dt>\n              <dd>{formatDate(backup.created_at)}</dd>\n            </div>\n            {backup.completed_at && (\n              <div className=\"flex justify-between\">\n                <dt className=\"text-gray-500\">Completed</dt>\n                <dd>{formatDate(backup.completed_at)}</dd>\n              </div>\n            )}\n            {backup.expires_at && (\n              <div className=\"flex justify-between\">\n                <dt className=\"text-gray-500\">Expires</dt>\n                <dd>{formatDate(backup.expires_at)}</dd>\n              </div>\n            )}\n          </dl>\n        </Card>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Error Message */}\n      {backup.error_message && (\n        <Card className=\"p-4 border-red-300 dark:border-red-800\">\n          <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold mb-2 text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">Error</h3>\n          <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">{backup.error_message}</p>\n        </Card>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Files */}\n      <Card className=\"p-4\">\n        <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold mb-4\">Backed Up Files</h3>\n        {filesQ.isLoading ? (\n          <div className=\"py-8 text-center text-gray-500\">Loading files...</div>\n        ) : files.length === 0 ? (\n          <EmptyState\n            title=\"No files\"\n            description=\"File list is not available\"\n          />\n        ) : (\n          <Table<BackupFile> rows={files} columns={fileColumns} keyOf={(f) => f.id} />\n        )}\n      </Card>\n\n      {/* Restore History */}\n      <Card className=\"p-4\">\n        <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold mb-4\">Restore History</h3>\n        {restoresQ.isLoading ? (\n          <div className=\"py-8 text-center text-gray-500\">Loading restore history...</div>\n        ) : restorePoints.length === 0 ? (\n          <EmptyState\n            title=\"No restores\"\n            description=\"This backup has never been restored\"\n          />\n        ) : (\n          <Table<RestorePoint> rows={restorePoints} columns={restoreColumns} keyOf={(r) => r.id} />\n        )}\n      </Card>\n\n      {/* Restore Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={restoreModalOpen}\n        onClose={() => setRestoreModalOpen(false)}\n        title=\"Restore Backup\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setRestoreModalOpen(false)}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              onClick={handleRestore}\n              disabled={!restoreTargetDir.trim() || restoreMutation.isPending}\n            >\n              {restoreMutation.isPending ? \"Restoring...\" : \"Restore\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium mb-1\">Target Directory *</label>\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"/var/www/example.com\"\n              value={restoreTargetDir}\n              onChange={(e) => setRestoreTargetDir(e.target.value)}\n            />\n            <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-gray-500\">\n              Files will be restored to this directory. Ensure it exists and is writable.\n            </p>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <input\n              type=\"checkbox\"\n              id=\"rollback-enabled\"\n              checked={rollbackEnabled}\n              onChange={(e) => setRollbackEnabled(e.target.checked)}\n              className=\"rounded border-gray-300\"\n            />\n            <label htmlFor=\"rollback-enabled\" className=\"text-sm\">\n              Enable automatic rollback (recommended)\n            </label>\n          </div>\n          <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">\n            If enabled, a temporary backup of the current files will be created before restore.\n            If the restore fails, the original files will be automatically restored.\n          </p>\n          {restoreMutation.isError && (\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">\n              Restore failed. Please check the target directory and try again.\n            </p>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </Modal>\n\n      {/* Delete Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={deleteModalOpen}\n        onClose={() => setDeleteModalOpen(false)}\n        title=\"Delete Backup\"\n        footer={\n          <>\n            <Button variant=\"outline\" onClick={() => setDeleteModalOpen(false)}>\n              Cancel\n            </Button>\n            <Button\n              variant=\"danger\"\n              onClick={() => deleteMutation.mutate()}\n              loading={deleteMutation.isPending}\n            >\n              {deleteMutation.isPending ? \"Deleting...\" : \"Delete\"}\n            </Button>\n          </>\n        }\n      >\n        <p>\n          Are you sure you want to delete this backup? This action cannot be undone.\n        </p>\n      </Modal>\n    </div>\n  );\n}","/**\n * Mail API client for OrvixPanel\n */\n\nimport { request } from \"./client\";\n\n// Types\nexport type */\n\nexport function formatDate(dateStr: string): string {\n  if (!dateStr) return \"-\";\n  try {\n    const date = new Date(dateStr);\n    return date.toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n      year: \"numeric\",\n      month: \"short\",\n      day: \"numeric\",\n      hour: \"2-digit\",\n      minute: \"2-digit\",\n    });\n  } catch {\n    return dateStr;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function formatBytes(bytes: number): string {\n  if (bytes === 0) return \"0 B\";\n  const k = 1024;\n  const sizes = [\"B\", \"KB\", \"MB\", \"GB\", \"TB\"];\n  const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));\n  return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(2)) + \" \" + sizes[i];\n}\n\nexport function formatMB(mb: number): string {\n  if (mb >= 1024) {\n    return (mb / 1024).toFixed(1) + \" GB\";\n  }\n  return mb + \" MB\";\n}","/**\n * Mail Domains List Page\n */\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from mutation\n  const createMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (domain: string) =>\n      createDomain({ domain, max_mailboxes: maxMailboxes }),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n !!showDNSModal,\n  });\n\n  if (isLoading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center h-64\">\n        <Spinner />\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (error) {\n            </th>\n                  <th className=\"px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider\">\n                    Status\n                  </th>\n                  <th className=\"px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider\">\n                    DKIM\n                  </th>\n                  <th className=\"px-6 py-3 setShowDNSModal(domain.id)}\n                      >\n                        DNS Records\n                      </Button>\n                      <Button\n                        variant=\"ghost\"\n                        \n                        onClick={() => {\n                          if (confirm(`Delete ${domain.domain}?`)) {\n                            deleteMutation.mutate(domain.id);\n Domain Name\n            </label>\n            <Input\n              type=\"text\"\n              value={newDomain}\n              onChange={(e) => setNewDomain(e.target.value)}\n       min={1}\n            />\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex justify-end gap-2\">\n            <Button\n              type=\"button\"\n              variant=\"secondary\"\n </Modal>\n\n      {/* DNS Records Modal */}\n      <Modal\n        open={!!showDNSModal}\n        onClose={() => setShowDNSModal(null)}\n        title=\"DNS Records\"\n      >\n        {dnsRecords ? listMailboxes,\n  listDomains,\n  createMailbox,\n  deleteMailbox,\n  suspendMailbox,\n  reactivateMailbox,\n  changeMailboxPassword,\n} from \"@/lib/api/mail\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/lib/ui/Input\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { Badge } from \"@/lib/ui/Badge\";\nimport { Modal } from \"@/lib/ui/Modal\";\nimport { Spinner } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\nimport { formatDate, formatMB } from \"@/lib/utils\";\n\nexport function MailboxesListPage() {\n  const queryClient = useQueryClient();\n  const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false);\n  const [showPasswordModal, setShowPasswordModal] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [newEmail, setNewEmail] = useState(\"\");\n  const [newPassword, setNewPassword] = useState(\"\");\n  const [selectedDomain, setSelectedDomain] = useState(\"\");\n  const [quotaMB, setQuotaMB] = useState(1024);\n\n  // Query mailboxes\n  const { data, isLoading, error } = useQuery({\n    queryKey: [\"mail\", \"mailboxes\"],\n    queryFn: () => listMailboxes({ page_size: 50 }),\n  });\n\n  // Query domains\n  const { data: domainsData } = useQuery({\n    queryKey: [\"mail\", \"domains\"],\n    queryFn: () => listDomains({ page_size: 100 }),\n  });\n\n  // Create mutation\n  const createMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: () => {\n      const email = newEmail.includes(\"@\") ? newEmail : `${newEmail}@${selectedDomain}`;\n      return createMailbox({\n        email,\n        password: newPassword,\n        domain_id: selectedDomain,\n        quota_mb: quotaMB,\n      });\n    },\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"mail\", \"mailboxes\"] });\n      setShowCreateModal(false);\n      setNewEmail(\"\");\n      setNewPassword(\"\");\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Delete mutation\n  const deleteMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => deleteMailbox(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"mail\", \"mailboxes\"] });\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Suspend mutation\n  const suspendMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => suspendMailbox(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"mail\", \"mailboxes\"] });\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Reactivate mutation\n  const reactivateMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: (id: string) => reactivateMailbox(id),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: [\"mail\", \"mailboxes\"] });\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Password change mutation\n  const passwordMutation = useMutation({\n    mutationFn: ({ id, password }: { id: string; password: string }) =>\n      changeMailboxPassword(id, password),\n    onSuccess: () => {\n      setShowPasswordModal(null);\n      setNewPassword(\"\");\n    },\n  });\n\n  // Calculate quota percentage\n  const getQuotaPercent = (used: number, total: number) => {\n    if (total === 0) return 0;\n    return Math.round((used / total) * 100);\n  };\n\n  // Get quota color\n  const getQuotaColor = (percent: number) => {\n    if (percent >= 90) return \"bg-red-500\";\n    if (percent >= 75) return \"bg-yellow-500\";\n    return \"bg-blue-500\";\n  };\n\n  if (isLoading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center h-64\">\n        <Spinner />\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (error) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center text-red-500\">\n        Failed to load mailboxes. Please try again.\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n        <div>\n          <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900\">Mailboxes</h1>\n          <p className=\"text-gray-500\">\n            Manage email mailboxes for your domains\n          </p>\n        </div>\n        <Button onClick={() => setShowCreateModal(true)}>\n          Add Mailbox\n        </Button>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Mailbox List */}\n      <Card>\n        {data?.mailboxes.length === 0 ? (\n          <div className=\"text-center py-12 text-gray-500\">\n            <p className=\"text-lg\">No mailboxes configured</p>\n            <p className=\"text-sm\">Add a mailbox to start receiving emails</p>\n          </div>\n        ) : (\n          <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n            <table className=\"min-w-full divide-y divide-gray-200\">\n              <thead className=\"bg-gray-50\">\n                <tr>\n                  <th className=\"px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider\">\n                    Email\n                  </th>\n                  <th className=\"px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider\">\n                    Status\n                  </th>\n                  <th className=\"px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider\">\n                    Quota\n                  </th>\n                  <th className=\"px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider\">\n                    Protocols\n                  </th>\n                  <th className=\"px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider\">\n                    Created\n                  </th>\n                  <th className=\"px-6 py-3 text-right text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider\">\n                    Actions\n                  </th>\n                </tr>\n              </thead>\n              <tbody className=\"bg-white divide-y divide-gray-200\">\n                {data?.mailboxes.map((mailbox) => {\n                  const quotaPercent = getQuotaPercent(mailbox.quota_used_mb, mailbox.quota_mb);\n                  return (\n                    <tr key={mailbox.id}>\n                      <td className=\"px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap\">\n                        <div className=\"font-medium text-gray-900\">{mailbox.email}</div>\n                      </td>\n                      <td className=\"px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap\">\n                        <Badge\n                          tone={\n                            mailbox.status === \"active\"\n                              ? \"success\"\n                              : mailbox.status === \"suspended\"\n                              ? \"warning\"\n                              : \"neutral\"\n                          }\n                        >\n                          {mailbox.status}\n                        </Badge>\n                      </td>\n                      <td className=\"px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap\">\n                        <div className=\"w-32\">\n                          <div className=\"flex justify-between text-xs mb-1\">\n                            <span>{formatMB(mailbox.quota_used_mb)}</span>\n                            <span>{formatMB(mailbox.quota_mb)}</span>\n                          </div>\n                          <div className=\"w-full bg-gray-200 rounded-full h-2\">\n                            <div\n                              className={`h-2      </div>\n                      </td>\n                      <td className=\"px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap\">\n                        <div className=\"flex gap-1\">\n                          {mailbox.enable_imap && (\n                            <Badge tone=\"info\">IMAP</Badge>\n                          )}\n                          {mailbox.enable_pop3 && (\n       )}\n                        </div>\n                      </td>\n                      <td className=\"px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500\">\n                        {formatDate(mailbox.created_at)}\n                      </td>\n                      <td className=\"px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-right text-sm\">\n                        <Button\n Password\n                        </Button>\n                        {mailbox.status === \"active\" ? \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\nimport { Spinner } from \"@/lib/ui/Feedback\";\n\ninterface StatCardProps {\n  title: string;\n  value: string | number;\n  subtitle?: string;\n  color?: string;\n}\n\nfunction StatCard({ title, value, subtitle, color = \"text-primary-600\" }: StatCardProps) {\n  return (\n    <Card>\n      <div className=\"text-sm text-gray-500\">{title}</div>\n      <div className={`text-3xl font-bold ${color}`}>{value}</div>\n      {subtitle && <div className=\"text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1\">{subtitle}</div>}\n    </Card>\n  );\n}\n\nexport function MailStatsPage() {\n  // Query mail stats\n  const { data: stats, isLoading: statsLoading, error: statsError } = useQuery({\n    queryKey: [\"mail\", \"stats\"],\n    queryFn: getMailStats,\n  });\n\n  // Query quota stats\n  const { data: quotaStats } = useQuery({\n    queryKey: [\"mail\", \"quota\", \"stats\"],\n    queryFn: getQuotaStats,\n  });\n\n  if (statsLoading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center h-64\">\n        <Spinner />\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (statsError) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center text-red-500\">\n        Failed to load mail statistics. Please try again.\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const storageUsedGB = stats ? (stats.storage_used_bytes / (1024 * 1024 * 1024)).toFixed(2) : \"0\";\n  const storageAvailableGB = stats ? (stats.storage_available_bytes / (1024 * 1024 * 1024)).toFixed(2) : \"0\";\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div>\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900\">Mail Statistics</h1>\n        <p className=\"text-gray-500\">\n          Overview of mail system usage and capacity\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Overview Stats */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4\">\n        <StatCard\n          title=\"Total Domains\"\n          value={stats?.total_domains || 0}\n          subtitle=\"configured domains\"\n        />\n        <StatCard\n          title=\"Total Mailboxes\"\n          value={stats?.total_mailboxes || 0}\n          subtitle=\"active mailboxes\"\n        />\n        <StatCard\n          title=\"Total Aliases\"\n          value={stats?.total_aliases || 0}\n          subtitle=\"email aliases\"\n        />\n        <StatCard\n          title=\"Total Forwarders\"\n          value={stats?.total_forwarders || 0}\n          subtitle=\"email forwarders\"\n        />\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Storage Stats */}\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4\">\n        <StatCard\n          title=\"Storage Used\"\n          value={`${storageUsedGB} GB`}\n          color=\"text-blue-600\"\n        />\n        <StatCard\n          title=\"Storage Available\"\n          value={`${storageAvailableGB} GB`}\n          color=\"text-green-600\"\n        />\n        <StatCard\n          title=\"Active Today\"\n          value={stats?.active_today || 0}\n          subtitle=\"mailboxes with activity\"\n        />\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Quota Distribution */}\n      <Card>\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg font-semibold mb-4\">Quota Usage Distribution</h2>\n        {quotaStats && quotaStats.summary ? {quotaStats.summary.warning_count}\n              </span>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n              <span className=\"text-sm text-gray-600\">Critical (80-100%)</span>\n              <span className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-red-600\">\n                {quotaStats.summary.critical_count}\n              </span>\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"pt-4 border-t\">\n              <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n                <span className=\"text-sm text-gray-600\">Total Quota Allocated</span>\n                <span className=\"text-xl font-semibold\">\n                  {(quotaStats.summary.total_quota_bytes / (1024 * 1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)} GB\n                </span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        ) : (\n          <div className=\"text-center text-gray-500 py-8\">\n            No quota data available\n          </div>\n UI doesn't refetch on every navigation, but the\n *     top status bar's polling queries override this.\n *   - 1 retry on network errors, 0 on 4xx (don't retry auth failures).\n *   - refetchOnWindowFocus: false — enterprise dashboards don't get\n *     yanked under the operator's mouse.\n */\n\nimport { QueryClient } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { ApiError } from \"@/lib/api/client\";\n\nexport const queryClient = new QueryClient({\n  defaultOptions: {\n    queries: {\n      staleTime: 5_000,\n      gcTime: 5 * 60_000,\n      refetchOnWindowFocus: false,\n      retry: (failureCount, error) => {\n        if (error instanceof ApiError) {\n          if (error.status >= 400 && error.status < 500) return false;\n        }\n        return failureCount < 1;\n      },\n    },\n    mutations: {\n      retry: false,\n    },\n  },\n});\n","/**\n * Error Boundary - Catches React errors in the component tree.\n * Shows a user-friendly error page instead of a blank screen.\n */\n\nimport { Component, type ReactNode, type ErrorInfo } from \"react\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/lib/ui/Button\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/lib/ui/Card\";\n\ninterface Props {\n  children: ReactNode;\n  fallback?: ReactNode;\n}\n\ninterface State {\n  hasError: boolean;\n  error: Error | null;\n}\n\nexport class ErrorBoundary extends Component<Props, State> {\n  constructor(props: Props) {\n    super(props);\n    this.state = { hasError: false, error: null };\n  }\n\n  static getDerivedStateFromError(error: Error): State {\n    return { hasError: true, error };\n  }\n\n  componentDidCatch(error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo) {\n    console.error(\"ErrorBoundary caught an error:\", error, errorInfo);\n  }\n\n  handleReset = () => {\n    this.setState({ hasError: false, error: null });\n  };\n\n  render() {\n    if (this.state.hasError) {\n      if (this.props.fallback) {\n        return this.props.fallback;\n      }\n\n      return (\n        <div className=\"flex min-h-[60vh] items-center justify-center p-6\">\n          <Card className=\"max-w-md text-center\">\n            <div className=\"mb-4 grid h-12 w-12 place-items-center rounded-full bg-danger/10 mx-auto\">\n              <svg\n                xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"\n                viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n                fill=\"none\"\n                stroke=\"currentColor\"\n                strokeWidth=\"2\"\n                className=\"h-6 w-6 text-danger\"\n              >\n                <circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\" />\n                <line x1=\"12\" y1=\"8\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"12\" />\n                <line x1=\"12\" y1=\"16\" x2=\"12.01\" y2=\"16\" />\n              </svg>\n            </div>\n            <h2 className=\"text-lg font-semibold text-ink-1\">Something went wrong</h2>\n            <p className=\"mt-2 text-sm text-ink-3\">\n              An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.\n            </p>\n            {import.meta.env.DEV && this.state.error && (\n              <details className=\"mt-4 text-left\">\n                <summary className=\"cursor-pointer text-sm text-danger\">Error details</summary>\n                <pre className=\"mt-2 overflow-x-auto rounded bg-surface-2 p-2 text-xs text-ink-2\">\n                  {this.state.error.message}\n                  {\"\\n\\n\"}\n                  {this.state.error.stack}\n                </pre>\n              </details>\n            )}\n            <div className=\"mt-6 flex justify-center gap-3\">\n              <Button variant=\"secondary\" onClick={() => window.location.reload()}>\n                Refresh page\n              </Button>\n              <Button variant=\"primary\" onClick={this.handleReset}>\n                Try again\n              </Button>\n            </div>\n          </Card>\n        </div>\n      );\n    }\n\n    return this.props.children;\n  }\n}","/**\n * App root. Wires the three global providers (TanStack Query,\n * TanStack Router, theme init) in the order they need to appear.\n *\n * The theme bootstrap (dark class on <html>) is applied by the\n * Zustand store on hydrate — see src/lib/theme/store.ts.\n *\n * Global error handling is provided by ErrorBoundary which catches\n * React errors in the component tree and displays a user-friendly\n * error page. Notifications are rendered by NotificationContainer.\n */\n\nimport { useEffect } from \"react\";\nimport { QueryClientProvider } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\nimport { RouterProvider } from \"@tanstack/react-router\";\nimport { router } from \"@/router\";\nimport { queryClient } from \"@/lib/query/client\";\nimport { useThemeStore } from \"@/lib/theme/store\";\nimport { ErrorBoundary } from \"@/lib/ui/ErrorBoundary\";\nimport { NotificationContainer } from \"@/lib/ui/Notification\";\n\nexport function App() {\n  const theme = useThemeStore((s) => s.theme);\n\n  // Apply the theme to <html> on first render + when it changes.\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const root = document.documentElement;\n    if (theme === \"dark\") root.classList.add(\"dark\");\n    else root.classList.remove(\"dark\");\n    root.style.colorScheme = theme;\n  }, [theme]);\n\n  return (\n    <ErrorBoundary>\n      <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>\n        <RouterProvider router={router} />\n        <NotificationContainer />\n      </QueryClientProvider>\n    </ErrorBoundary>\n  );\n}\n","/**\n * Entry point. The Vite-generated bundle inlines the bootstrap\n * script in index.html; this file is the React mount.\n */\n\nimport { StrictMode } from \"react\";\nimport { createRoot } from \"react-dom/client\";\nimport { App } from \"@/App\";\nimport \"@/styles/globals.css\";\n\nconst el = document.getElementById(\"root\");\nif (!el) throw new Error(\"missing #root element in index.html\");\n\ncreateRoot(el).render(\n  <StrictMode>\n    <App />\n  </StrictMode>,\n);\n"],"file":"assets/index-bt-q2ky_.js"}
